WITH ManufacturerCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        Manufacturer,
        COUNT(*) AS club_count
    FROM club
    GROUP BY Manufacturer
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(club_count) AS max_count
    FROM ManufacturerCounts
)
SELECT Manufacturer
FROM ManufacturerCounts
WHERE club_count = (SELECT max_count FROM MaxCount)
ORDER BY Manufacturer;

SELECT 
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_first_name,
    c.customer_last_name
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.customer_id IN (
    -- Customers with more than 2 orders
    SELECT o.customer_id
    FROM Orders o
    GROUP BY o.customer_id
    HAVING COUNT(o.order_id) > 2
) AND c.customer_id IN (
    -- Customers with at least 3 items total
    SELECT o.customer_id
    FROM Orders o
    JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
    GROUP BY o.customer_id
    HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) >= 3
);

    c.customer_id,

    GROUP BY o.customer_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) > 2 
       AND COUNT(oi.order_item_id) >= 3
);

44:
SELECT DISTINCT DATE(o.date_order_placed) AS order_date
FROM Orders o
WHERE o.date_order_placed = (SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) FROM Orders)
   OR o.order_id IN (
        SELECT order_id
        FROM Order_Items
        GROUP BY order_id
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
   )
ORDER BY order_date;

WITH orders_with_multiple_items AS (
    SELECT order_id
    FROM Order_Items
    GROUP BY order_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
earliest_order_date AS (
    SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) AS earliest_date
    FROM Orders
)
SELECT DISTINCT o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
WHERE o.date_order_placed = (SELECT earliest_date FROM earliest_order_date)
   OR o.order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM orders_with_multiple_items);

WITH order_item_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        order_id,
        COUNT(*) AS item_count
    FROM Order_Items
    GROUP BY order_id
),
earliest_order_date AS (
    SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) AS earliest_date
    FROM Orders
)
SELECT DISTINCT o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
LEFT JOIN order_item_counts c ON o.order_id = c.order_id
CROSS JOIN earliest_order_date e
WHERE o.date_order_placed = e.earliest_date
   OR COALESCE(c.item_count, 0) > 1
ORDER BY o.date_order_placed;

SELECT DISTINCT o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
WHERE o.date_order_placed = (SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) FROM Orders)
   OR o.order_id IN (
        SELECT order_id
        FROM Order_Items
        GROUP BY order_id
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
   )
ORDER BY o.date_order_placed;

SELECT DISTINCT o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
WHERE o.date_order_placed = (SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) FROM Orders)
   OR o.order_id IN (
        SELECT order_id
        FROM Order_Items
        GROUP BY order_id
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
   );

WITH order_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        COUNT(order_id) AS order_count
    FROM Orders
    GROUP BY customer_id
    HAVING COUNT(order_id) > 2
),
item_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        o.customer_id,
        COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS item_count
    FROM Orders o
    JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
    GROUP BY o.customer_id
    HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) >= 3
)
SELECT 
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_first_name,
    c.customer_last_name
FROM Customers c
INNER JOIN order_counts oc ON c.customer_id = oc.customer_id
INNER JOIN item_counts ic ON c.customer_id = ic.customer_id;

SELECT 
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_first_name,
    c.customer_last_name
FROM 
    Customers c
    JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
    JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_first_name,
    c.customer_last_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) > 2 
    AND COUNT(oi.order_item_id) >= 3;

SELECT 
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_first_name,
    c.customer_last_name
FROM Customers c
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
        o.customer_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count,
        COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS item_count
    FROM Orders o
    INNER JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
    GROUP BY o.customer_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) > 2 
       AND COUNT(oi.order_item_id) >= 3
) AS agg ON c.customer_id = agg.customer_id;

SELECT

    HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) >= 3

    'Earliest Order' AS order_type
FROM Orders

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    o.date_order_placed AS order_date,
    'Order with >1 item' AS order_type
FROM Orders o
JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
GROUP BY o.order_id, o.date_order_placed
HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 1
ORDER BY order_date;

SELECT 
    MIN(date_order_placed) AS order_date, 
    'Earliest order' AS description 
FROM Orders

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    O.date_order_placed AS order_date, 
    'Order with >1 item' AS description 
FROM Orders O
JOIN Order_Items OI ON O.order_id = OI.order_id
GROUP BY O.order_id, O.date_order_placed
HAVING COUNT(OI.order_item_id) > 1
ORDER BY description, order_date;

SELECT order_date
FROM (
    SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) AS order_date
    FROM Orders
    UNION
    SELECT o.date_order_placed AS order_date
    FROM Orders o
    JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
    GROUP BY o.order_id, o.date_order_placed
    HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 1
) combined_dates
ORDER BY order_date;

SELECT DISTINCT o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
WHERE o.date_order_placed = (SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) FROM Orders)
UNION
SELECT o2.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o2
JOIN (
    SELECT order_id
    FROM Order_Items
    GROUP BY order_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) multi ON o2.order_id = multi.order_id;

SELECT date_order_placed 
FROM Orders 
WHERE date_order_placed = (SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) FROM Orders)
UNION
SELECT o.date_order_placed 
FROM Orders o 
JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id 
GROUP BY o.order_id, o.date_order_placed 
HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 1;

WITH OrderTotals AS (
    SELECT 
        oi.order_id,
        SUM(p.product_price) AS total_price
    FROM Order_Items oi
    JOIN Products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
    GROUP BY oi.order_id
)
SELECT 
    order_id,
    total_price
FROM OrderTotals
WHERE total_price = (SELECT MIN(total_price) FROM OrderTotals);

SELECT 
    oi.order_id,
    SUM(p.product_price) AS total_price
FROM 
    Order_Items oi
JOIN 
    Products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY 
    oi.order_id
HAVING 
    SUM(p.product_price) = (
        SELECT MIN(total_price)
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                SUM(p2.product_price) AS total_price
            FROM 
                Order_Items oi2
            JOIN 
                Products p2 ON oi2.product_id = p2.product_id
            GROUP BY 
                oi2.order_id
        ) AS order_totals
    );

SELECT 
    oi.order_id,
    SUM(p.product_price) AS total_price
FROM 
    Order_Items oi
    JOIN Products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY 
    oi.order_id
ORDER BY 
    total_price ASC
LIMIT 1;

    SUM(product_price) AS total_price_sum
FROM Order_Items
JOIN Products ON Order_Items.product_id = Products.product_id
GROUP BY order_id
HAVING SUM(product_price) = (
    SELECT MIN(total_sum)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(product_price) AS total_sum
        FROM Order_Items
        JOIN Products ON Order_Items.product_id = Products.product_id
        GROUP BY order_id
    ) AS sums
);

WITH ProductOrderCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        product_id,
        COUNT(*) AS order_count
    FROM Order_Items
    GROUP BY product_id
),
MaxOrderCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(order_count) AS max_count
    FROM ProductOrderCounts
)
SELECT 
    p.product_id,
    p.product_name,
    p.product_price
FROM Products p
JOIN ProductOrderCounts poc ON p.product_id = poc.product_id
JOIN MaxOrderCount moc ON poc.order_count = moc.max_count;

WITH ProductOrderCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.product_id,
        p.product_name,
        p.product_price,
        COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS order_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(oi.order_item_id) DESC) AS rank_by_freq
    FROM Products p
    LEFT JOIN Order_Items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_price
)
SELECT 
    product_id,
    product_name,
    product_price
FROM ProductOrderCounts
WHERE rank_by_freq = 1;

WITH ProductOrderCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.product_id,
        p.product_name,
        p.product_price,
        COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS order_count
    FROM Products p
    LEFT JOIN Order_Items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_price
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(order_count) AS max_order_count
    FROM ProductOrderCounts
)
SELECT 
    poc.product_id,
    poc.product_name,
    poc.product_price
FROM ProductOrderCounts poc
CROSS JOIN MaxCount mc
WHERE poc.order_count = mc.max_order_count
ORDER BY poc.product_id;

WITH ProductOrderCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.product_id,
        p.product_name,
        p.product_price,
        COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS order_count
    FROM Products p
    LEFT JOIN Order_Items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
    GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_price
),
RankedProducts AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY order_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM ProductOrderCounts
)
SELECT 
    product_id,
    product_name,
    product_price
FROM RankedProducts
WHERE rank = 1
ORDER BY product_id;

    o.date_order_placed AS date,
    SUM(p.product_price) AS total_cost

    Orders o
    JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
    JOIN Products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY 
    o.order_id, 
    o.date_order_placed
ORDER BY 
    o.order_id;

    o.order_id, o.date_order_placed

    o.order_id;

WITH gender_order_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        c.gender_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders
    FROM Customers c
    LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
    GROUP BY c.gender_code
),
least_ordering_gender AS (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM gender_order_counts
    WHERE total_orders = (SELECT MIN(total_orders) FROM gender_order_counts)
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    email_address,
    town_city,
    county
FROM Customers
WHERE gender_code = (SELECT gender_code FROM least_ordering_gender);

SELECT 
    email_address,
    town_city,
    county
FROM Customers
WHERE gender_code = (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            c.gender_code, 
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count
        FROM Customers c
        LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
        GROUP BY c.gender_code
    ) gender_order_counts
    WHERE order_count = (
        SELECT MIN(order_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count
            FROM Customers c
            LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
            GROUP BY c.gender_code
        ) min_counts
    )
);

WITH GenderOrderCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        c.gender_code,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders
    FROM Customers c
    LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
    GROUP BY c.gender_code
),
MinOrderGender AS (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM GenderOrderCounts
    WHERE total_orders = (SELECT MIN(total_orders) FROM GenderOrderCounts)
)
SELECT 
    email_address,
    town_city,
    county
FROM Customers
WHERE gender_code IN (SELECT gender_code FROM MinOrderGender);

WITH gender_counts AS (
    SELECT gender_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM Customers
    WHERE gender_code IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY gender_code
),
min_gender AS (
    SELECT gender_code
    FROM gender_counts
    WHERE cnt = (SELECT MIN(cnt) FROM gender_counts)
)
SELECT email_address, town_city, county
FROM Customers
WHERE gender_code IN (SELECT gender_code FROM min_gender);

SELECT 
    d.Director_ID,
    d.Name,
    COUNT(p.Program_ID) AS program_count
FROM 
    director d
JOIN 
    program p ON d.Director_ID = p.Director_ID
GROUP BY 
    d.Director_ID, d.Name
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.Program_ID) = (
        SELECT MAX(program_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(Program_ID) AS program_count
            FROM program
            GROUP BY Director_ID
        ) AS counts
    );

WITH program_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        d.Director_ID,
        d.Name,
        COUNT(p.Program_ID) AS num_programs
    FROM 
        director d
    JOIN 
        program p ON d.Director_ID = p.Director_ID
    GROUP BY 
        d.Director_ID, d.Name
)
SELECT 
    Name,
    num_programs
FROM 
    program_counts
WHERE 
    num_programs = (SELECT MAX(num_programs) FROM program_counts);

WITH director_program_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        d.Director_ID,
        d.Name,
        COUNT(p.Program_ID) AS program_count
    FROM director d
    JOIN program p ON d.Director_ID = p.Director_ID
    GROUP BY d.Director_ID, d.Name
)
SELECT 
    Name,
    program_count
FROM director_program_counts
WHERE program_count = (
    SELECT MAX(program_count) 
    FROM director_program_counts
);

WITH director_program_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        d.Director_ID,
        d.Name,
        COUNT(p.Program_ID) AS program_count
    FROM 
        director d
    LEFT JOIN 
        program p ON d.Director_ID = p.Director_ID
    GROUP BY 
        d.Director_ID, d.Name
)
SELECT 
    Director_ID,
    Name,
    program_count
FROM 
    director_program_counts
WHERE 
    program_count = (SELECT MAX(program_count) FROM director_program_counts);

SELECT 
    d.Name AS Director_Name,
    COUNT(p.Program_ID) AS Program_Count
FROM 
    director d
JOIN 
    program p ON d.Director_ID = p.Director_ID
GROUP BY 
    d.Director_ID, d.Name
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.Program_ID) = (
        SELECT MAX(Program_Count)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(Program_ID) AS Program_Count
            FROM program
            GROUP BY Director_ID
        ) AS counts
    )
ORDER BY 
    Program_Count DESC;

WITH director_count AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel_ID, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT Director_ID) AS num_directors
    FROM director_admin
    GROUP BY Channel_ID
),
max_directors AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_directors) AS max_count
    FROM director_count
)
SELECT 
    c.Name, 
    c.Internet
FROM channel c
JOIN director_count dc ON c.Channel_ID = dc.Channel_ID
JOIN max_directors md ON dc.num_directors = md.max_count;

WITH director_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel_ID, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT Director_ID) AS num_directors
    FROM director_admin
    GROUP BY Channel_ID
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_directors) AS max_num
    FROM director_counts
)
SELECT 
    c.Name, 
    c.Internet
FROM channel c
JOIN director_counts dc ON c.Channel_ID = dc.Channel_ID
JOIN max_count mc ON dc.num_directors = mc.max_num;

WITH director_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel_ID,
        COUNT(DISTINCT Director_ID) AS num_directors
    FROM director_admin
    GROUP BY Channel_ID
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_directors) AS max_num
    FROM director_counts
)
SELECT 
    c.Name,
    c.Internet
FROM channel c
JOIN director_counts dc ON c.Channel_ID = dc.Channel_ID
JOIN max_count mc ON dc.num_directors = mc.max_num;

WITH director_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel_ID,
        COUNT(DISTINCT Director_ID) AS num_directors
    FROM director_admin
    GROUP BY Channel_ID
),
ranked_channels AS (
    SELECT 
        Channel_ID,
        num_directors,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY num_directors DESC) AS rnk
    FROM director_counts
)
SELECT 
    c.Name,
    c.Internet
FROM ranked_channels rc
JOIN channel c ON rc.Channel_ID = c.Channel_ID
WHERE rc.rnk = 1;

FROM channel c
JOIN director_admin da ON c.Channel_ID = da.Channel_ID
JOIN director d ON da.Director_ID = d.Director_ID
GROUP BY c.Channel_ID, c.Name
HAVING 
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.Age < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
    AND SUM(CASE WHEN d.Age > 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0;

SELECT c.Name
FROM channel c
JOIN director_admin da ON c.Channel_ID = da.Channel_ID
JOIN director d ON da.Director_ID = d.Director_ID
GROUP BY c.Channel_ID, c.Name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.Age < 40 THEN d.Director_ID END) > 0
    AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.Age > 60 THEN d.Director_ID END) > 0;

FROM channel c
WHERE c.Channel_ID IN (
    SELECT da.Channel_ID
    FROM director_admin da
    JOIN director d ON da.Director_ID = d.Director_ID
    GROUP BY da.Channel_ID
    HAVING 
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.Age < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        AND SUM(CASE WHEN d.Age > 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
);

FROM channel c 
WHERE c.Channel_ID IN (
    SELECT da.Channel_ID 
    FROM director_admin da 
    JOIN director d ON da.Director_ID = d.Director_ID 
    WHERE d.Age < 40
) 
AND c.Channel_ID IN (

    JOIN director d ON da.Director_ID = d.Director_ID 
    WHERE d.Age > 60
);

FROM channel c

    SELECT cp.Channel_ID
    FROM (

        UNION
        SELECT Channel_ID, Director_ID FROM director_admin

    JOIN director d ON cp.Director_ID = d.Director_ID
    GROUP BY cp.Channel_ID
    HAVING 
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.Age < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        AND SUM(CASE WHEN d.Age > 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
);

    COUNT(*) AS assessment_count

    Student_Assessments

    Assessment

    COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MIN(count_assessment)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_assessment
            FROM Student_Assessments
            GROUP BY Assessment
        ) AS counts
    )
ORDER BY 
    Assessment;

SELECT

    COUNT(*) AS frequency
FROM 
    Student_Assessments

    Assessment IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    Assessment
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MIN(cnt)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM Student_Assessments
            WHERE Assessment IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY Assessment
        ) AS counts
    )
ORDER BY 
    Assessment;

WITH AnswerFrequency AS (
    SELECT 
        va.Valid_Answer_Text,
        COUNT(sa.Valid_Answer_ID) AS Frequency
    FROM Valid_Answers va
    LEFT JOIN Student_Assessments sa ON va.Valid_Answer_ID = sa.Valid_Answer_ID
    GROUP BY va.Valid_Answer_Text
),
MaxFrequency AS (
    SELECT MAX(Frequency) AS MaxFreq
    FROM AnswerFrequency
)
SELECT Valid_Answer_Text
FROM AnswerFrequency
WHERE Frequency = (SELECT MaxFreq FROM MaxFrequency);

279:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name,
    c.payment_method_code
FROM 
    Customers c
WHERE 
    c.payment_method_code IN (
        SELECT 
            payment_method_code
        FROM 
            Customers
        GROUP BY 
            payment_method_code
        HAVING 
            COUNT(*) = (
                SELECT 
                    MIN(customer_count)
                FROM 
                    (SELECT 
                        COUNT(*) AS customer_count
                     FROM 
                        Customers
                     GROUP BY 
                        payment_method_code
                    ) AS counts
            )
    )
ORDER BY 
    c.customer_name;

WITH PaymentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        payment_method_code,
        COUNT(*) AS num_customers
    FROM Customers
    GROUP BY payment_method_code
),
MinPaymentCount AS (
    SELECT MIN(num_customers) AS min_count
    FROM PaymentCounts
)
SELECT 
    c.customer_name,
    c.payment_method_code
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.payment_method_code IN (
    SELECT payment_method_code
    FROM PaymentCounts pc
    JOIN MinPaymentCount m ON pc.num_customers = m.min_count
)
ORDER BY c.customer_name;

WITH payment_counts AS (
    SELECT payment_method_code, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
    FROM Customers
    GROUP BY payment_method_code
),
min_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(customer_count) AS min_customer_count
    FROM payment_counts
)
SELECT c.customer_name, c.payment_method_code
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.payment_method_code IN (
    SELECT payment_method_code
    FROM payment_counts
    WHERE customer_count = (SELECT min_customer_count FROM min_count)
)
ORDER BY c.customer_name;

WITH payment_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        payment_method_code, 
        COUNT(*) AS customer_count
    FROM Customers
    GROUP BY payment_method_code
),
min_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(customer_count) AS min_customer_count
    FROM payment_counts
)
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    c.payment_method_code
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.payment_method_code IN (
    SELECT payment_method_code
    FROM payment_counts
    WHERE customer_count = (SELECT min_customer_count FROM min_count)
)
ORDER BY c.customer_name;

SELECT customer_name, payment_method_code
FROM Customers
WHERE payment_method_code IN (
    SELECT payment_method_code
    FROM (
        SELECT payment_method_code, 
               RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*)) AS rnk
        FROM Customers
        GROUP BY payment_method_code
    ) AS ranked_payments
    WHERE rnk = 1
)
ORDER BY customer_name;

    SELECT 
        payment_method_code,
        COUNT(*) AS method_count
    FROM Customers
    WHERE payment_method_code IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY payment_method_code
),
MinCount AS (
    SELECT MIN(method_count) AS min_count
    FROM PaymentMethodCounts
)
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_name
FROM Customers c
INNER JOIN PaymentMethodCounts pmc ON c.payment_method_code = pmc.payment_method_code
INNER JOIN MinCount mc ON pmc.method_count = mc.min_count
ORDER BY c.customer_name;

WITH PaymentMethodCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        payment_method_code,
        COUNT(*) AS method_count
    FROM Customers
    WHERE payment_method_code IS NOT NULL

),
LeastCommonMethod AS (
    SELECT

    FROM PaymentMethodCounts
    WHERE method_count = (SELECT MIN(method_count) FROM PaymentMethodCounts)

SELECT

FROM Customers c
INNER JOIN LeastCommonMethod lcm 
    ON c.payment_method_code = lcm.payment_method_code
ORDER BY c.customer_name;

WITH OrderCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        COUNT(order_id) AS num_orders
    FROM Customer_Orders
    GROUP BY customer_id
),
RankedCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        num_orders,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY num_orders DESC) AS rank_num
    FROM OrderCounts
)
SELECT 
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_name,
    c.customer_phone,
    c.customer_email
FROM Customers c
JOIN RankedCustomers rc ON c.customer_id = rc.customer_id
WHERE rc.rank_num = 1;

313:
SELECT DISTINCT 
    co.order_id, 
    co.order_date
FROM 
    Customer_Orders co
WHERE 
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM Order_Items oi 
        WHERE oi.order_id = co.order_id 
          AND CAST(oi.order_quantity AS UNSIGNED) > 6
    )
    OR 
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM Order_Items oi2 
        WHERE oi2.order_id = co.order_id 
        GROUP BY oi2.order_id 
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
    )
ORDER BY 
    co.order_date, 
    co.order_id;

SELECT DISTINCT co.order_id, co.order_date
FROM Customer_Orders co
JOIN Order_Items oi ON co.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE CAST(oi.order_quantity AS DECIMAL) > 6
   OR co.order_id IN (
        SELECT order_id
        FROM Order_Items
        GROUP BY order_id
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) > 3
   )
ORDER BY co.order_date;

SELECT DISTINCT co.order_id, co.order_date
FROM Customer_Orders co
WHERE co.order_id IN (
    -- Orders with any product quantity > 6
    SELECT order_id
    FROM Order_Items
    WHERE CAST(order_quantity AS INTEGER) > 6
    UNION
    -- Orders with more than 3 distinct products
    SELECT order_id
    FROM Order_Items
    GROUP BY order_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) > 3
)
ORDER BY co.order_date;

SELECT DISTINCT co.order_id, co.order_date
FROM Customer_Orders co
JOIN Order_Items oi ON co.order_id = oi.order_id

JOIN Customers_and_Services cs ON c.Customer_ID = cs.Customer_ID
JOIN Services s ON cs.Service_ID = s.Service_ID
JOIN Customer_Interactions ci ON c.Customer_ID = ci.Customer_ID 
    AND cs.Service_ID = ci.Service_ID
WHERE c.Customer_Details = 'Hardy Kutch'
    AND ci.Status_Code = 'bad';

SELECT DISTINCT s.Service_Details
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Interactions ci ON c.Customer_ID = ci.Customer_ID
JOIN Services s ON ci.Service_ID = s.Service_ID
WHERE c.Customer_Details = 'Hardy Kutch'
  AND ci.Status_Code = 'bad';

SELECT DISTINCT s.Service_Details
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customers_and_Services cas ON c.Customer_ID = cas.Customer_ID
JOIN Services s ON cas.Service_ID = s.Service_ID
WHERE c.Customer_Details = 'Hardy Kutch'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Customer_Interactions ci
    WHERE ci.Customer_ID = c.Customer_ID
      AND ci.Service_ID = s.Service_ID
      AND ci.Status_Code = 'bad'
);

SELECT DISTINCT s.Service_Details
FROM Services s
WHERE s.Service_ID IN (
    -- Services used by Hardy Kutch (from Customers_and_Services)
    SELECT cas.Service_ID
    FROM Customers_and_Services cas
    JOIN Customers c ON cas.Customer_ID = c.Customer_ID
    WHERE c.Customer_Details = 'Hardy Kutch'
    INTERSECT
    -- Services rated as 'bad' in an interaction with Hardy Kutch
    SELECT ci.Service_ID
    FROM Customer_Interactions ci
    JOIN Customers c ON ci.Customer_ID = c.Customer_ID
    WHERE c.Customer_Details = 'Hardy Kutch'
      AND ci.Status_Code = 'bad'
);

SELECT DISTINCT s.Service_Details
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customers_and_Services cs ON c.Customer_ID = cs.Customer_ID
JOIN Customer_Interactions ci ON c.Customer_ID = ci.Customer_ID AND cs.Service_ID = ci.Service_ID
JOIN Services s ON cs.Service_ID = s.Service_ID
WHERE c.Customer_Details = 'Hardy Kutch'
  AND ci.Status_Code = 'bad';

SELECT 
    v.name AS vehicle_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(rh.total_hours), 0) AS total_rental_hours
FROM Vehicles v
LEFT JOIN Renting_history rh ON v.id = rh.vehicles_id
GROUP BY v.id, v.name
ORDER BY v.name;

SELECT 
    v.name AS vehicle_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(rh.total_hours), 0) AS total_rental_hours
FROM Vehicles v
LEFT JOIN Renting_history rh ON v.id = rh.vehicles_id
GROUP BY v.id, v.name
ORDER BY v.name;

SELECT 
    v.name AS vehicle_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(rh.total_hours), 0) AS total_rental_hours
FROM Vehicles v
LEFT JOIN Renting_history rh ON v.id = rh.vehicles_id
GROUP BY v.id, v.name
ORDER BY v.name;

SELECT 
    v.name AS vehicle_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(rh.total_hours), 0) AS total_rental_hours
FROM 
    Vehicles v

WITH vehicle_rent_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        vehicles_id,
        COUNT(*) AS rent_count
    FROM Renting_history
    GROUP BY vehicles_id
)
SELECT 
    v.name,
    v.Model_year
FROM Vehicles v
JOIN vehicle_rent_counts vrc ON v.id = vrc.vehicles_id
WHERE vrc.rent_count = (SELECT MAX(rent_count) FROM vehicle_rent_counts);

WITH vehicle_counts AS (
    SELECT vehicles_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM Renting_history
    GROUP BY vehicles_id
)
SELECT v.name, v.Model_year
FROM Vehicles v
JOIN vehicle_counts vc ON v.id = vc.vehicles_id
WHERE vc.cnt = (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM vehicle_counts);

WITH VehicleRentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        v.id,
        v.name,
        v.Model_year,
        COUNT(rh.id) AS rent_count
    FROM Vehicles v
    LEFT JOIN Renting_history rh ON v.id = rh.vehicles_id
    GROUP BY v.id, v.name, v.Model_year
),
MaxRentCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(rent_count) AS max_count
    FROM VehicleRentCounts
)
SELECT 
    vrc.name,
    vrc.Model_year
FROM VehicleRentCounts vrc
JOIN MaxRentCount mrc ON vrc.rent_count = mrc.max_count
WHERE vrc.rent_count = mrc.max_count;

    WHERE c.teacher_id = t.teacher_id
    AND LOWER(c.class_details) LIKE '%data%'
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Classes c2
    WHERE c2.teacher_id = t.teacher_id
    AND LOWER(c2.class_details) LIKE 'net%'
);

SELECT teacher_details
FROM Teachers t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Classes c
    WHERE c.teacher_id = t.teacher_id
    AND c.class_details LIKE '%data%'
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Classes c
    WHERE c.teacher_id = t.teacher_id
    AND c.class_details LIKE 'net%'
);

SELECT DISTINCT t.teacher_details
FROM Teachers t
WHERE t.teacher_id IN (
    SELECT c.teacher_id
    FROM Classes c
    WHERE c.class_details LIKE '%data%'
    EXCEPT
    SELECT c.teacher_id
    FROM Classes c
    WHERE c.class_details LIKE 'net%'
);

442:
SELECT 
    s.student_id,
    s.bio_data
FROM 
    Students s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        COUNT(*) AS class_count
    FROM 
        Classes
    GROUP BY 
        student_id
) c ON s.student_id = c.student_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        COUNT(*) AS detention_count
    FROM 
        Detention
    GROUP BY 
        student_id
) d ON s.student_id = d.student_id
WHERE 
    COALESCE(c.class_count, 0) >= 2 
    OR COALESCE(d.detention_count, 0) < 2;

SELECT 
    s.student_id, 
    s.bio_data
FROM 
    Students s
    LEFT JOIN Classes c ON s.student_id = c.student_id
    LEFT JOIN Detention d ON s.student_id = d.student_id
GROUP BY 
    s.student_id, 
    s.bio_data
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.class_id) >= 2 
    OR COUNT(DISTINCT d.detention_id) < 2;

SELECT 
    s.student_id, 
    s.bio_data
FROM 
    Students s
    LEFT JOIN Classes c ON s.student_id = c.student_id
    LEFT JOIN Detention d ON s.student_id = d.student_id
GROUP BY 
    s.student_id, 
    s.bio_data
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.class_id) >= 2 
    OR COUNT(DISTINCT d.detention_id) < 2;

SELECT 
    s.student_id, 
    s.bio_data
FROM 
    Students s
WHERE 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Classes c WHERE c.student_id = s.student_id) >= 2
    OR 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Detention d WHERE d.student_id = s.student_id) < 2;

WITH qualified_students AS (
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
    UNION
    SELECT s.student_id
    FROM Students s
    LEFT JOIN Detention d ON s.student_id = d.student_id
    GROUP BY s.student_id
    HAVING COUNT(d.detention_id) < 2
)
SELECT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
INNER JOIN qualified_students q ON s.student_id = q.student_id;

SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    -- Students with 2 or more classes
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    -- Students with less than 2 detentions
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Detention
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) < 2
    UNION
    -- Students with no detentions (not in Detention table at all)
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Students
    WHERE student_id NOT IN (SELECT student_id FROM Detention)
);

SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    -- Students with 2 or more classes
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    -- Students with less than 2 detentions
    SELECT s2.student_id
    FROM Students s2
    LEFT JOIN Detention d ON s2.student_id = d.student_id
    GROUP BY s2.student_id
    HAVING COUNT(d.detention_id) < 2
);

SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    -- Students with 2 or more classes
    SELECT c.student_id
    FROM Classes c
    GROUP BY c.student_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
OR s.student_id IN (
    -- Students with less than 2 detentions
    SELECT d.student_id
    FROM (
        SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS detention_count
        FROM Detention
        GROUP BY student_id
    ) d
    WHERE d.detention_count < 2
    UNION
    -- Students with zero detentions (not in Detention table at all)
    SELECT st.student_id
    FROM Students st
    WHERE st.student_id NOT IN (SELECT student_id FROM Detention)
)
ORDER BY s.student_id;

SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
OR s.student_id IN (
    SELECT s2.student_id
    FROM Students s2
    LEFT JOIN Detention d ON s2.student_id = d.student_id
    GROUP BY s2.student_id
    HAVING COUNT(d.detention_id) < 2
)
ORDER BY s.student_id;

(
    SELECT s.student_id, s.bio_data
    FROM Students s
    INNER JOIN Classes c ON s.student_id = c.student_id
    GROUP BY s.student_id, s.bio_data
    HAVING COUNT(c.class_id) >= 2
)
UNION
(
    SELECT s.student_id, s.bio_data
    FROM Students s
    LEFT JOIN Detention d ON s.student_id = d.student_id
    GROUP BY s.student_id, s.bio_data
    HAVING COUNT(d.detention_id) < 2
)
ORDER BY student_id;

WITH TeacherClassCount AS (
    SELECT 
        t.teacher_id,
        t.teacher_details,
        COUNT(c.class_id) AS num_classes
    FROM Teachers t
    LEFT JOIN Classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id
    GROUP BY t.teacher_id, t.teacher_details
)
SELECT 
    teacher_id,
    teacher_details
FROM TeacherClassCount
WHERE num_classes = (SELECT MAX(num_classes) FROM TeacherClassCount);

SELECT 
    t.teacher_id, 
    t.teacher_details
FROM Teachers t
INNER JOIN Classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id
GROUP BY t.teacher_id, t.teacher_details
HAVING COUNT(c.class_id) = (
    SELECT MAX(course_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(class_id) AS course_count
        FROM Classes
        GROUP BY teacher_id
    ) AS counts
);

WITH TeacherCourseCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        teacher_id,
        COUNT(class_id) AS course_count
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY teacher_id
),
RankedTeachers AS (
    SELECT 
        teacher_id,
        course_count,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY course_count DESC) AS rank_position
    FROM TeacherCourseCounts
)
SELECT 
    t.teacher_id,
    t.teacher_details
FROM Teachers t
INNER JOIN RankedTeachers r ON t.teacher_id = r.teacher_id
WHERE r.rank_position = 1;

SELECT 
    t.teacher_id, 
    t.teacher_details
FROM 
    Teachers t
    INNER JOIN Classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id
GROUP BY 
    t.teacher_id, 
    t.teacher_details
HAVING 
    COUNT(c.class_id) = (
        SELECT MAX(course_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(class_id) AS course_count
            FROM Classes
            GROUP BY teacher_id
        ) AS teacher_course_counts
    );

SELECT 
    t.teacher_id, 
    t.teacher_details
FROM Teachers t
INNER JOIN Classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id
GROUP BY t.teacher_id, t.teacher_details
HAVING COUNT(c.class_id) = (
    SELECT MAX(course_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(class_id) AS course_count
        FROM Classes
        GROUP BY teacher_id
    ) AS subquery
);

LIMIT 1;

WITH teacher_class_counts AS (
    SELECT teacher_id, COUNT(*) AS num_classes
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY teacher_id
)
SELECT t.teacher_id, t.teacher_details
FROM Teachers t
JOIN teacher_class_counts c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id
WHERE c.num_classes = (SELECT MAX(num_classes) FROM teacher_class_counts);

SELECT t.teacher_id, t.teacher_details
FROM Teachers t
JOIN Classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id
GROUP BY t.teacher_id, t.teacher_details
ORDER BY COUNT(c.class_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH teacher_course_counts AS (
    SELECT teacher_id, COUNT(*) AS num_courses
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY teacher_id
)
SELECT t.teacher_id, t.teacher_details
FROM Teachers t
JOIN teacher_course_counts tc ON t.teacher_id = tc.teacher_id
WHERE tc.num_courses = (SELECT MAX(num_courses) FROM teacher_course_counts);

WITH TeacherCourseCount AS (
    SELECT 
        teacher_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT class_details) AS num_courses
    FROM Classes
    GROUP BY teacher_id
),
MaxCourseCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_courses) AS max_num
    FROM TeacherCourseCount
)
SELECT 
    t.teacher_id,
    t.teacher_details
FROM Teachers t
JOIN TeacherCourseCount tcc ON t.teacher_id = tcc.teacher_id
JOIN MaxCourseCount mcc ON tcc.num_courses = mcc.max_num;

SELECT 
    behaviour_monitoring_details, 
    COUNT(*) AS count
FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    behaviour_monitoring_details, 
    COUNT(*) AS count
FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    behaviour_monitoring_details,
    COUNT(*) AS count
FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
        GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
    ) AS counts
)
ORDER BY count DESC;

WITH detail_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        behaviour_monitoring_details,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    WHERE behaviour_monitoring_details IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
)
SELECT 
    behaviour_monitoring_details,
    count
FROM detail_counts
WHERE count = (SELECT MAX(count) FROM detail_counts);

WITH DetailCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        behaviour_monitoring_details,
        COUNT(*) AS count_result
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    WHERE behaviour_monitoring_details IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(count_result) AS max_count
    FROM DetailCounts
)
SELECT 
    dc.behaviour_monitoring_details,
    dc.count_result
FROM DetailCounts dc
INNER JOIN MaxCount mc ON dc.count_result = mc.max_count
ORDER BY dc.behaviour_monitoring_details;

    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    WHERE behaviour_monitoring_details IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
)

FROM Students s
JOIN Behaviour_Monitoring bm ON s.student_id = bm.student_id
JOIN MostCommonBehaviour mcb ON bm.behaviour_monitoring_details = mcb.behaviour_monitoring_details;

SELECT s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    SELECT bm.student_id
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring bm
    WHERE bm.behaviour_monitoring_details IN (
        SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details
        FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
        WHERE behaviour_monitoring_details IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
        HAVING COUNT(*) = (
            SELECT MAX(cnt)
            FROM (
                SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
                FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
                WHERE behaviour_monitoring_details IS NOT NULL
                GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
            ) counts
        )
    )
);

    SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details, cnt,
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rnk
    FROM freq
)
SELECT s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    SELECT b.student_id
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring b
    INNER JOIN ranked r ON b.behaviour_monitoring_details = r.behaviour_monitoring_details
    WHERE r.rnk = 1
);

RankedEvents AS (

MaxCount AS (

    SELECT 
        event_type_code,
        COUNT(*) AS event_count
    FROM Student_Events
    GROUP BY event_type_code
),
MaxEventType AS (

StudentsWithOnlyMostCommon AS (

    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MostCommonBehaviour)
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING 
        COUNT(*) > 0 
        AND MIN(behaviour_monitoring_details) = (SELECT most_common FROM MostCommonBehaviour)
        AND MAX(behaviour_monitoring_details) = (SELECT most_common FROM MostCommonBehaviour)
)

FROM Students s

    SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details AS mode_detail
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
StudentsWithOnlyMode AS (
    SELECT student_id
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    WHERE (SELECT mode_detail FROM MostCommonBehaviour) IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING 
        COUNT(*) > 0 
        AND MAX(behaviour_monitoring_details) = MIN(behaviour_monitoring_details)
        AND MAX(behaviour_monitoring_details) = (SELECT mode_detail FROM MostCommonBehaviour)
)
SELECT s.bio_data
FROM Students s
INNER JOIN StudentsWithOnlyMode swom ON s.student_id = swom.student_id;

WITH MostCommonResult AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 behaviour_monitoring_details AS common_result
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
),
StudentBehaviour AS (
    SELECT student_id,
           COUNT(DISTINCT behaviour_monitoring_details) AS num_distinct_results,
           MAX(behaviour_monitoring_details) AS only_result
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    GROUP BY student_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT s.bio_data, s.student_details
FROM Students s
INNER JOIN StudentBehaviour sb ON s.student_id = sb.student_id
CROSS JOIN MostCommonResult mcr
WHERE sb.num_distinct_results = 1
  AND sb.only_result = mcr.common_result;

WITH MostCommonDetail AS (
    SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details AS mode_detail
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT s.student_id, s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    SELECT bm.student_id
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring bm
    CROSS JOIN MostCommonDetail mcd
    GROUP BY bm.student_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN bm.behaviour_monitoring_details = mcd.mode_detail THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
);

WITH most_common_detail AS (
    SELECT behaviour_monitoring_details AS common_detail
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring
    GROUP BY behaviour_monitoring_details
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT s.bio_data
FROM Students s
WHERE s.student_id IN (
    SELECT bm.student_id
    FROM Behaviour_Monitoring bm
    CROSS JOIN most_common_detail mcd
    GROUP BY bm.student_id
    HAVING MIN(bm.behaviour_monitoring_details) = mcd.common_detail
       AND MAX(bm.behaviour_monitoring_details) = mcd.common_detail
);

SELECT 
    d.detention_type_code, 
    r.detention_type_description
FROM Detention d
JOIN Ref_Detention_Type r ON d.detention_type_code = r.detention_type_code
GROUP BY d.detention_type_code, r.detention_type_description
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    d.detention_type_code,
    r.detention_type_description
FROM Detention d
JOIN Ref_Detention_Type r ON d.detention_type_code = r.detention_type_code
GROUP BY d.detention_type_code, r.detention_type_description
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    d.detention_type_code,
    r.detention_type_description,
    COUNT(*) AS detention_count
FROM Detention d
JOIN Ref_Detention_Type r ON d.detention_type_code = r.detention_type_code
GROUP BY d.detention_type_code, r.detention_type_description
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MIN(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM Detention
        GROUP BY detention_type_code
    ) AS counts
);

WITH DetentionCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        rdt.detention_type_code,
        rdt.detention_type_description,
        COUNT(d.detention_id) AS detention_count
    FROM Ref_Detention_Type rdt
    LEFT JOIN Detention d ON rdt.detention_type_code = d.detention_type_code
    GROUP BY rdt.detention_type_code, rdt.detention_type_description
),
MinCount AS (
    SELECT MIN(detention_count) AS min_count
    FROM DetentionCounts
)
SELECT 
    dc.detention_type_code,
    dc.detention_type_description
FROM DetentionCounts dc
CROSS JOIN MinCount mc
WHERE dc.detention_count = mc.min_count
ORDER BY dc.detention_type_code;

SELECT 
    r.detention_type_code,
    r.detention_type_description,
    COUNT(d.detention_id) AS num_detentions
FROM Ref_Detention_Type r
LEFT JOIN Detention d ON r.detention_type_code = d.detention_type_code
GROUP BY r.detention_type_code, r.detention_type_description
HAVING COUNT(d.detention_id) = (
    SELECT MIN(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(d2.detention_id) AS cnt
        FROM Ref_Detention_Type r2
        LEFT JOIN Detention d2 ON r2.detention_type_code = d2.detention_type_code
        GROUP BY r2.detention_type_code
    ) AS counts
);

SELECT 
    d.detention_type_code,
    r.detention_type_description
FROM 
    Detention d
JOIN 
    Ref_Detention_Type r ON d.detention_type_code = r.detention_type_code
GROUP BY 
    d.detention_type_code, r.detention_type_description
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.detention_type_code,
    r.detention_type_description
FROM Detention d
INNER JOIN Ref_Detention_Type r ON d.detention_type_code = r.detention_type_code
GROUP BY r.detention_type_code, r.detention_type_description
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MIN(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM Detention
        GROUP BY detention_type_code
    ) AS counts
);

SELECT 
    r.detention_type_code,
    r.detention_type_description
FROM Ref_Detention_Type r
LEFT JOIN Detention d ON r.detention_type_code = d.detention_type_code
GROUP BY r.detention_type_code, r.detention_type_description
ORDER BY COUNT(d.detention_id) ASC, r.detention_type_code
LIMIT 1;

WITH DetentionCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        detention_type_code,
        COUNT(*) AS count_detentions
    FROM Detention
    GROUP BY detention_type_code
),
Ranked AS (
    SELECT 
        detention_type_code,
        count_detentions,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY count_detentions ASC) AS rnk
    FROM DetentionCounts
)
SELECT 
    r.detention_type_code,
    rdt.detention_type_description
FROM Ranked r
JOIN Ref_Detention_Type rdt ON r.detention_type_code = rdt.detention_type_code
WHERE r.rnk = 1
ORDER BY r.detention_type_code;

SELECT 
    r.detention_type_code,
    r.detention_type_description
FROM Ref_Detention_Type r
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
        detention_type_code,
        COUNT(*) AS count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*)) AS rank_num
    FROM Detention
    GROUP BY detention_type_code
) d ON r.detention_type_code = d.detention_type_code
WHERE d.rank_num = 1;

INNER JOIN (

        address_type_code, 
        COUNT(*) AS frequency
    FROM

    GROUP BY

    ORDER BY

    FROM Students_Addresses sa

        ON sa.address_type_code = rat.address_type_code

SELECT 
    address_type_code,
    address_type_description
FROM AddressTypeCounts
WHERE usage_count = (SELECT MAX(usage_count) FROM AddressTypeCounts);

        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM Students_Addresses
    GROUP BY address_type_code

RankedAddressTypes AS (
    SELECT

    FROM Books_Order bo
    GROUP BY bo.ISBN

    SELECT MAX(COUNT(DISTINCT bo2.IdOrder))
    FROM Books_Order bo2
    GROUP BY bo2.ISBN
);

    )
);

JOIN Books_Order bo ON o.IdOrder = bo.IdOrder
GROUP BY c.IdClient, c.Name
ORDER BY SUM(bo.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.Name
FROM Client c
JOIN (
    SELECT o.IdClient, SUM(bo.amount) AS total_books
    FROM Orders o
    JOIN Books_Order bo ON o.IdOrder = bo.IdOrder
    GROUP BY o.IdClient
) client_totals ON c.IdClient = client_totals.IdClient
WHERE client_totals.total_books = (
    SELECT MAX(total_books)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(bo.amount) AS total_books
        FROM Orders o
        JOIN Books_Order bo ON o.IdOrder = bo.IdOrder
        GROUP BY o.IdClient
    ) sub
);

SELECT c.Name
FROM Client c

ORDER BY SUM(bo.amount) DESC

HAVING SUM(bo.amount) = (

        SELECT SUM(bo2.amount) AS total_books
        FROM Client c2
        JOIN Orders o2 ON c2.IdClient = o2.IdClient
        JOIN Books_Order bo2 ON o2.IdOrder = bo2.IdOrder
        GROUP BY c2.IdClient
    ) AS client_totals
);

SELECT c.Name

JOIN Books_Order bo ON o.IdOrder = bo.IdOrder
GROUP BY c.IdClient, c.Name
ORDER BY SUM(bo.amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH ClientTotals AS (
    SELECT o.IdClient, SUM(bo.amount) AS total_books
    FROM Orders o
    JOIN Books_Order bo ON o.IdOrder = bo.IdOrder
    GROUP BY o.IdClient
)
SELECT c.Name
FROM Client c
JOIN ClientTotals ct ON c.IdClient = ct.IdClient
WHERE ct.total_books = (SELECT MAX(total_books) FROM ClientTotals);

SELECT c.Name
FROM Client c
JOIN (
    SELECT o.IdClient, SUM(bo.amount) AS total_books
    FROM Books_Order bo
    JOIN Orders o ON bo.IdOrder = o.IdOrder
    GROUP BY o.IdClient
    ORDER BY total_books DESC
    FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
) top_client ON c.IdClient = top_client.IdClient;

SELECT DISTINCT 
    c.Collection_ID,
    c.Collection_Name,
    c.Collection_Description
FROM Collection_Subsets cs
JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm 
    ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = csm.Collection_Subset_ID
JOIN Collections c 
    ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Collection_ID 
    OR c.Collection_ID = csm.Related_Collection_ID
WHERE cs.Collection_Subset_Name = 'Top collection';

SELECT DISTINCT 
    c.Collection_ID,
    c.Collection_Name,
    c.Collection_Description
FROM Collection_Subsets cs
JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm 
    ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = csm.Collection_Subset_ID
JOIN Collections c 
    ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Collection_ID 
    OR c.Collection_ID = csm.Related_Collection_ID
WHERE cs.Collection_Subset_Name = 'Top collection';

SELECT DISTINCT c.Collection_ID, c.Collection_Name, c.Collection_Description
FROM Collections c
WHERE c.Collection_ID IN (
    SELECT Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members csm
    JOIN Collection_Subsets cs ON csm.Collection_Subset_ID = cs.Collection_Subset_ID
    WHERE cs.Collection_Subset_Name = 'Top collection'
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members csm
    JOIN Collection_Subsets cs ON csm.Collection_Subset_ID = cs.Collection_Subset_ID
    WHERE cs.Collection_Subset_Name = 'Top collection'
);

SELECT DISTINCT c.*
FROM Collections c
WHERE c.Collection_ID IN (
    SELECT Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members csm
    JOIN Collection_Subsets cs ON csm.Collection_Subset_ID = cs.Collection_Subset_ID
    WHERE cs.Collection_Subset_Name = 'Top collection'
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members csm
    JOIN Collection_Subsets cs ON csm.Collection_Subset_ID = cs.Collection_Subset_ID
    WHERE cs.Collection_Subset_Name = 'Top collection'
);

SELECT DISTINCT c.*
FROM Collections c
WHERE c.Collection_ID IN (
    SELECT m.Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members m
    INNER JOIN Collection_Subsets s ON m.Collection_Subset_ID = s.Collection_Subset_ID
    WHERE s.Collection_Subset_Name = 'Top collection'
    UNION
    SELECT m.Related_Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members m
    INNER JOIN Collection_Subsets s ON m.Collection_Subset_ID = s.Collection_Subset_ID
    WHERE s.Collection_Subset_Name = 'Top collection'
);

WITH RECURSIVE Ancestors AS (
    -- Anchor: find the starting collection
    SELECT Collection_ID, Parent_Collection_ID, Collection_Name
    FROM Collections
    WHERE Collection_Name = 'Nice'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive step: go up the hierarchy
    SELECT c.Collection_ID, c.Parent_Collection_ID, c.Collection_Name
    FROM Collections c
    INNER JOIN Ancestors a ON c.Collection_ID = a.Parent_Collection_ID
)
SELECT Collection_Name
FROM Ancestors
WHERE Collection_Name != 'Nice'
ORDER BY Collection_ID;

    SELECT dsm.Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
    FROM Document_Objects do
    JOIN Document_Subset_Members dsm ON do.Document_Object_ID = dsm.Document_Object_ID
    WHERE do.Owner = 'Ransom'
    UNION
    -- Case 2: Ransom-owned document is the 'Related_Document_Object_ID', so the related doc is 'Document_Object_ID'
    SELECT dsm.Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
    FROM Document_Objects do
    JOIN Document_Subset_Members dsm ON do.Document_Object_ID = dsm.Related_Document_Object_ID
    WHERE do.Owner = 'Ransom'
) AS related_docs
ORDER BY doc_id;

WITH RansomDocs AS (
    SELECT Document_Object_ID
    FROM Document_Objects
    WHERE Owner = 'Ransom'
)
SELECT DISTINCT RelatedDocID
FROM (
    -- Documents related to Ransom's docs where Ransom's doc is Document_Object_ID
    SELECT Related_Document_Object_ID AS RelatedDocID
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    WHERE Document_Object_ID IN (SELECT Document_Object_ID FROM RansomDocs)
    UNION
    -- Documents related to Ransom's docs where Ransom's doc is Related_Document_Object_ID
    SELECT Document_Object_ID AS RelatedDocID
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    WHERE Related_Document_Object_ID IN (SELECT Document_Object_ID FROM RansomDocs)
) AS AllRelated
WHERE RelatedDocID NOT IN (SELECT Document_Object_ID FROM RansomDocs)
ORDER BY RelatedDocID;

    ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = cm.Collection_Subset_ID
GROUP BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID, cs.Collection_Subset_Name
ORDER BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID;

SELECT 
    cs.Collection_Subset_ID,
    cs.Collection_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT all_cols.col_id) AS number_of_collections
FROM 
    Collection_Subsets cs
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Collection_Subset_ID, Collection_ID AS col_id 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Collection_Subset_ID, Related_Collection_ID AS col_id 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
) AS all_cols ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = all_cols.Collection_Subset_ID
GROUP BY 
    cs.Collection_Subset_ID, 
    cs.Collection_Subset_Name
ORDER BY 
    cs.Collection_Subset_ID;

FROM Collection_Subsets cs

    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL

    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
) cm ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = cm.Collection_Subset_ID
GROUP BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID, cs.Collection_Subset_Name
ORDER BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID;

FROM

    UNION
    SELECT Collection_Subset_ID, Related_Collection_ID AS col

) u ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = u.Collection_Subset_ID
GROUP BY

    cs.Collection_Subset_Name

SELECT 
    cs.Collection_Subset_ID,
    cs.Collection_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Collection_ID) AS Number_of_Collections
FROM Collection_Subsets cs
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Collection_Subset_ID, Collection_ID FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    UNION
    SELECT Collection_Subset_ID, Related_Collection_ID FROM Collection_Subset_Members
) cm ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = cm.Collection_Subset_ID
GROUP BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID, cs.Collection_Subset_Name
ORDER BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID;

SELECT 
    cs.Collection_Subset_ID,
    cs.Collection_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT csm.Collection_ID) + COUNT(DISTINCT csm.Related_Collection_ID) - 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN csm.Collection_ID = csm.Related_Collection_ID THEN csm.Collection_ID END) AS Number_of_Collections
FROM Collection_Subsets cs
LEFT JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = csm.Collection_Subset_ID
GROUP BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID, cs.Collection_Subset_Name
ORDER BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID;

SELECT 
    cs.Collection_Subset_ID,
    cs.Collection_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Collection_ID) + COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Related_Collection_ID) -
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Collection_ID) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Related_Collection_ID) > 0 
            THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) 
                  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT Collection_ID FROM Collection_Subset_Members WHERE Collection_Subset_ID = cs.Collection_Subset_ID
                        INTERSECT
                        SELECT DISTINCT Related_Collection_ID FROM Collection_Subset_Members WHERE Collection_Subset_ID = cs.Collection_Subset_ID) AS overlap)
            ELSE 0
        END AS Number_of_Collections
FROM Collection_Subsets cs
LEFT JOIN Collection_Subset_Members cm ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = cm.Collection_Subset_ID
GROUP BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID, cs.Collection_Subset_Name
ORDER BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID;

WITH All_Collection_Subset_Members AS (
    SELECT Collection_Subset_ID, Collection_ID AS Collection
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Collection_Subset_ID, Related_Collection_ID AS Collection
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
)
SELECT 
    cs.Collection_Subset_ID,
    cs.Collection_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT acsm.Collection) AS Number_of_Collections
FROM Collection_Subsets cs
LEFT JOIN All_Collection_Subset_Members acsm 
    ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = acsm.Collection_Subset_ID
GROUP BY cs.Collection_Subset_ID, cs.Collection_Subset_Name;

SELECT 
    cs.Collection_Subset_ID,
    cs.Collection_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT all_cols.col) AS number_of_collections
FROM 
    Collection_Subsets cs
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Collection_Subset_ID, Collection_ID AS col 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    UNION 
    SELECT Collection_Subset_ID, Related_Collection_ID AS col 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
) AS all_cols 
ON cs.Collection_Subset_ID = all_cols.Collection_Subset_ID
GROUP BY 
    cs.Collection_Subset_ID, 
    cs.Collection_Subset_Name
ORDER BY 
    cs.Collection_Subset_ID;

    WHERE Related_Document_Object_ID IN (
        SELECT Document_Object_ID
        FROM Document_Objects
        WHERE Owner = 'Braeden'
    )
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT Related_Document_Object_ID AS DocID
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    WHERE Document_Object_ID IN (
        SELECT Document_Object_ID
        FROM Document_Objects
        WHERE Owner = 'Braeden'
    )
)
SELECT DISTINCT do.Owner
FROM Document_Objects do
JOIN RelatedDocumentIDs rdi ON do.Document_Object_ID = rdi.DocID;

SELECT DISTINCT d.Owner
FROM Document_Objects d
WHERE d.Document_Object_ID IN (

WITH BraedenDocs AS (

RelatedDocs AS (

SELECT DISTINCT do.Owner

    OR do.Document_Object_ID = dsm.Related_Document_Object_ID

SELECT DISTINCT ds.Document_Subset_Name

        OR d.Document_Object_ID = dm.Related_Document_Object_ID)

    ON dm.Document_Subset_ID = ds.Document_Subset_ID
WHERE d.Owner = 'Braeden';

SELECT DISTINCT ds.Document_Subset_Name

JOIN Document_Subsets ds

712:
SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID AS subset_id,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name AS subset_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dsm.document_id) AS number_of_different_documents
FROM Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS document_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS document_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
) dsm ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = dsm.Document_Subset_ID
GROUP BY ds.Document_Subset_ID, ds.Document_Subset_Name
ORDER BY ds.Document_Subset_ID;

SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT doc_id) AS number_of_different_documents
FROM Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
) combined ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = combined.Document_Subset_ID
GROUP BY ds.Document_Subset_ID, ds.Document_Subset_Name
ORDER BY ds.Document_Subset_ID;

WITH All_Document_Subset_Docs AS (
    SELECT 
        Document_Subset_ID,
        Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        Document_Subset_ID,
        Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
),
Distinct_Doc_Counts AS (
    SELECT 
        Document_Subset_ID,
        COUNT(DISTINCT doc_id) AS num_different_documents
    FROM All_Document_Subset_Docs
    GROUP BY Document_Subset_ID
)
SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    COALESCE(ddc.num_different_documents, 0) AS number_of_different_documents
FROM Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN Distinct_Doc_Counts ddc 
    ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = ddc.Document_Subset_ID
ORDER BY ds.Document_Subset_ID;

SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT doc_ids.Document_ID) AS Number_Of_Different_Documents
FROM 
    Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS Document_ID
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS Document_ID
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
) doc_ids ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = doc_ids.Document_Subset_ID
GROUP BY 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID, ds.Document_Subset_Name
ORDER BY 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID;

SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT combined.doc_id) AS number_of_different_documents
FROM 
    Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS doc_id 
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id 
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
) combined ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = combined.Document_Subset_ID
GROUP BY 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID, 
    ds.Document_Subset_Name;

WITH SubsetDocumentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        dsm.Document_Subset_ID,
        COUNT(DISTINCT doc_id) AS num_documents
    FROM (
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
        UNION ALL
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
    ) dsm
    GROUP BY dsm.Document_Subset_ID
)
SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    sdc.num_documents
FROM SubsetDocumentCounts sdc
JOIN Document_Subsets ds ON sdc.Document_Subset_ID = ds.Document_Subset_ID
WHERE sdc.num_documents = (SELECT MAX(num_documents) FROM SubsetDocumentCounts)
ORDER BY ds.Document_Subset_ID;

WITH SubsetDocumentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        dsm.Document_Subset_ID,
        COUNT(DISTINCT doc_id) AS distinct_document_count
    FROM (
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
        UNION ALL
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
    ) dsm
    GROUP BY dsm.Document_Subset_ID
)
SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    sdc.distinct_document_count AS number_of_documents
FROM SubsetDocumentCounts sdc
JOIN Document_Subsets ds ON sdc.Document_Subset_ID = ds.Document_Subset_ID
WHERE sdc.distinct_document_count = (
    SELECT MAX(distinct_document_count) 
    FROM SubsetDocumentCounts
);

WITH SubsetDocumentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        Document_Subset_ID,
        COUNT(DISTINCT Document_ID) AS DistinctDocumentCount
    FROM (
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS Document_ID
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
        UNION
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS Document_ID
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
    ) AS AllDocs
    GROUP BY Document_Subset_ID
),
RankedSubsets AS (
    SELECT 
        sdc.Document_Subset_ID,
        ds.Document_Subset_Name,
        sdc.DistinctDocumentCount,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sdc.DistinctDocumentCount DESC) AS rnk
    FROM SubsetDocumentCounts sdc
    JOIN Document_Subsets ds ON sdc.Document_Subset_ID = ds.Document_Subset_ID
)
SELECT 
    Document_Subset_ID,
    Document_Subset_Name,
    DistinctDocumentCount AS NumberOfDocuments
FROM RankedSubsets
WHERE rnk = 1;

SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dsm.document_id) AS number_of_documents
FROM Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS document_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS document_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
) dsm ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = dsm.Document_Subset_ID
GROUP BY ds.Document_Subset_ID, ds.Document_Subset_Name
ORDER BY number_of_documents DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH subset_docs AS (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
),
distinct_counts AS (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT doc_id) AS num_documents
    FROM subset_docs
    GROUP BY Document_Subset_ID
)
SELECT ds.Document_Subset_ID, ds.Document_Subset_Name, dc.num_documents
FROM distinct_counts dc
JOIN Document_Subsets ds ON dc.Document_Subset_ID = ds.Document_Subset_ID
ORDER BY dc.num_documents DESC
LIMIT 1;
705:
SELECT Document_Object_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT Related_Document_Object_ID) AS number_of_related_documents
FROM Document_Subset_Members
GROUP BY Document_Object_ID
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Related_Document_Object_ID) BETWEEN 2 AND 4;

WITH DocumentRelations AS (
    SELECT Document_Object_ID AS doc_id, Related_Document_Object_ID AS related_doc_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id, Document_Object_ID AS related_doc_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
)
SELECT doc_id AS "Document ID",
       COUNT(DISTINCT related_doc_id) AS "Number of Related Documents"
FROM DocumentRelations
WHERE doc_id != related_doc_id
GROUP BY doc_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT related_doc_id) BETWEEN 2 AND 4;

WITH doc_relations AS (
    SELECT Document_Object_ID AS doc_id, Related_Document_Object_ID AS related_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    WHERE Document_Object_ID != Related_Document_Object_ID
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id, Document_Object_ID AS related_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    WHERE Document_Object_ID != Related_Document_Object_ID
)
SELECT doc_id AS "Document ID", COUNT(DISTINCT related_id) AS "Number of Related Documents"
FROM doc_relations
GROUP BY doc_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT related_id) BETWEEN 2 AND 4
ORDER BY doc_id;

SELECT doc_id AS Document_Object_ID, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT related_doc_id) AS Number_of_Related_Documents
FROM (
    SELECT Document_Object_ID AS doc_id, 
           Related_Document_Object_ID AS related_doc_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id, 
           Document_Object_ID AS related_doc_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
) AS all_relations
WHERE doc_id != related_doc_id
GROUP BY doc_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT related_doc_id) BETWEEN 2 AND 4
ORDER BY doc_id;

WITH related_pairs AS (
    SELECT Document_Object_ID AS doc_id, Related_Document_Object_ID AS related_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id, Document_Object_ID AS related_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
)
SELECT doc_id AS "Document ID", 
       COUNT(DISTINCT related_id) AS "Number of Related Documents"
FROM related_pairs
WHERE doc_id != related_id   -- Exclude self-relations if any
GROUP BY doc_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT related_id) BETWEEN 2 AND 4
ORDER BY doc_id;
703:
WITH DocumentRelatedCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        do.Document_Object_ID,
        COUNT(DISTINCT dsm.Related_Document_Object_ID) AS RelatedCount
    FROM Document_Objects do
    LEFT JOIN Document_Subset_Members dsm 
        ON do.Document_Object_ID = dsm.Document_Object_ID
    GROUP BY do.Document_Object_ID
),
MinRelatedCount AS (
    SELECT MIN(RelatedCount) AS MinCount
    FROM DocumentRelatedCounts
)
SELECT 
    drc.Document_Object_ID,
    drc.RelatedCount
FROM DocumentRelatedCounts drc
JOIN MinRelatedCount mrc 
    ON drc.RelatedCount = mrc.MinCount
ORDER BY drc.Document_Object_ID;

WITH RelatedCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        doc_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT related_id) AS related_count
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            Document_Object_ID AS doc_id,
            Related_Document_Object_ID AS related_id
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
        WHERE Document_Object_ID != Related_Document_Object_ID
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 
            Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id,
            Document_Object_ID AS related_id
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
        WHERE Document_Object_ID != Related_Document_Object_ID
    ) AS relations
    GROUP BY doc_id
)
SELECT 
    do.Document_Object_ID AS document_id,
    COALESCE(rc.related_count, 0) AS number_of_related_documents
FROM Document_Objects do
LEFT JOIN RelatedCounts rc ON do.Document_Object_ID = rc.doc_id
WHERE COALESCE(rc.related_count, 0) = (
    SELECT MIN(COALESCE(rc2.related_count, 0))
    FROM Document_Objects do2
    LEFT JOIN RelatedCounts rc2 ON do2.Document_Object_ID = rc2.doc_id
)
ORDER BY do.Document_Object_ID;

WITH doc_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        do.Document_Object_ID,
        COUNT(DISTINCT dsm.Related_Document_Object_ID) AS num_related
    FROM Document_Objects do
    LEFT JOIN Document_Subset_Members dsm ON do.Document_Object_ID = dsm.Document_Object_ID
    GROUP BY do.Document_Object_ID
)
SELECT Document_Object_ID, num_related
FROM doc_counts
WHERE num_related = (SELECT MIN(num_related) FROM doc_counts)
ORDER BY Document_Object_ID;

WITH all_relations AS (
    SELECT Document_Object_ID AS doc, Related_Document_Object_ID AS related_doc
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc, Document_Object_ID AS related_doc
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
),
related_counts AS (
    SELECT doc, COUNT(DISTINCT related_doc) AS cnt
    FROM all_relations
    GROUP BY doc
),
all_docs AS (
    SELECT Document_Object_ID
    FROM Document_Objects
),
doc_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        d.Document_Object_ID,
        COALESCE(rc.cnt, 0) AS num_related
    FROM all_docs d
    LEFT JOIN related_counts rc ON d.Document_Object_ID = rc.doc
)
SELECT Document_Object_ID, num_related
FROM doc_counts
WHERE num_related = (SELECT MIN(num_related) FROM doc_counts);

WITH all_relations AS (
    SELECT Document_Object_ID AS doc, Related_Document_Object_ID AS related 
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc, Document_Object_ID AS related 
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
),
relation_counts AS (
    SELECT doc AS Document_Object_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT related) AS num_related
    FROM all_relations
    WHERE doc != related
    GROUP BY doc
),
all_docs_counts AS (
    SELECT do.Document_Object_ID, COALESCE(rc.num_related, 0) AS num_related
    FROM Document_Objects do
    LEFT JOIN relation_counts rc ON do.Document_Object_ID = rc.Document_Object_ID
)
SELECT Document_Object_ID, num_related
FROM all_docs_counts
WHERE num_related = (SELECT MIN(num_related) FROM all_docs_counts)
ORDER BY Document_Object_ID;

        dsm.Document_Subset_ID,

    FROM (
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS doc_id

        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id

WITH SubsetDocumentCounts AS (

        Document_Subset_ID,
        COUNT(DISTINCT doc_id) AS num_documents
    FROM (
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS doc_id 
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
        UNION ALL
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id 
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
    ) combined
    GROUP BY Document_Subset_ID
)
SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    sdc.num_documents
FROM SubsetDocumentCounts sdc
JOIN Document_Subsets ds ON sdc.Document_Subset_ID = ds.Document_Subset_ID
WHERE sdc.num_documents = (SELECT MAX(num_documents) FROM SubsetDocumentCounts);
711:
SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dsm.document_id) AS number_of_documents
FROM 
    Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS document_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS document_id
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
) dsm ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = dsm.Document_Subset_ID
GROUP BY 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID, 
    ds.Document_Subset_Name
ORDER BY 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID;

WITH AllDocIDs AS (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS DocID
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    WHERE Document_Object_ID IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS DocID
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    WHERE Related_Document_Object_ID IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID AS "subset id",
    ds.Document_Subset_Name AS "subset name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT ad.DocID) AS "number of different documents"
FROM Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN AllDocIDs ad ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = ad.Document_Subset_ID
GROUP BY ds.Document_Subset_ID, ds.Document_Subset_Name
ORDER BY ds.Document_Subset_ID;

SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    COALESCE(doc_counts.document_count, 0) AS number_of_different_documents
FROM Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        Document_Subset_ID,
        COUNT(DISTINCT Document_ID) AS document_count
    FROM (
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS Document_ID
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
        UNION ALL
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS Document_ID
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
    ) AS all_docs
    GROUP BY Document_Subset_ID
) AS doc_counts ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = doc_counts.Document_Subset_ID
ORDER BY ds.Document_Subset_ID;

SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ad.Doc_ID) AS Number_of_Documents
FROM Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS Doc_ID 
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
    UNION
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS Doc_ID 
    FROM Document_Subset_Members
) ad ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = ad.Document_Subset_ID
GROUP BY ds.Document_Subset_ID, ds.Document_Subset_Name
ORDER BY ds.Document_Subset_ID;

SELECT 
    ds.Document_Subset_ID,
    ds.Document_Subset_Name,
    COALESCE(doc_counts.num_documents, 0) AS number_of_documents
FROM Document_Subsets ds
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT Document_Subset_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT doc_id) AS num_documents
    FROM (
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
        UNION
        SELECT Document_Subset_ID, Related_Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
        FROM Document_Subset_Members
    ) combined
    GROUP BY Document_Subset_ID
) doc_counts ON ds.Document_Subset_ID = doc_counts.Document_Subset_ID
ORDER BY ds.Document_Subset_ID;

SELECT Document_Object_ID
FROM (
    SELECT 
        do.Document_Object_ID,
        COUNT(dic.Collection_ID) AS collection_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(dic.Collection_ID) ASC) AS rnk
    FROM Document_Objects do
    LEFT JOIN Documents_in_Collections dic ON do.Document_Object_ID = dic.Document_Object_ID
    GROUP BY do.Document_Object_ID
) AS counts
WHERE rnk = 1;

SELECT Document_Object_ID
FROM Document_Objects
LEFT JOIN Documents_in_Collections 
    ON Document_Objects.Document_Object_ID = Documents_in_Collections.Document_Object_ID
GROUP BY Document_Object_ID
HAVING COUNT(Collection_ID) = (
    SELECT MIN(col_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(Collection_ID) AS col_count
        FROM Document_Objects d
        LEFT JOIN Documents_in_Collections dic 
            ON d.Document_Object_ID = dic.Document_Object_ID
        GROUP BY d.Document_Object_ID
    ) AS counts
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT related_collection_id) AS related_collections_count
FROM (
    -- Collections where 'Best' is the source (Collection_ID = Best's ID)
    SELECT csm.Related_Collection_ID AS related_collection_id
    FROM Collections c
    JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Collection_ID
    WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best'
    
    UNION
    
    -- Collections where 'Best' is the target (Related_Collection_ID = Best's ID)
    SELECT csm.Collection_ID AS related_collection_id
    FROM Collections c
    JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Related_Collection_ID
    WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best'
) AS related_ids
WHERE related_collection_id != (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT related_id) AS related_collection_count
FROM (
    SELECT Related_Collection_ID AS related_id
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    WHERE Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best')
    UNION
    SELECT Collection_ID AS related_id
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    WHERE Related_Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best')
) AS related_ids
WHERE related_id <> (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT related.Collection_ID) AS related_collection_count
FROM (
    -- Get the Collection_ID of 'Best'
    SELECT Collection_ID 
    FROM Collections 
    WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best'
) AS best_col
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    -- Find all Collection_IDs related to best_col.Collection_ID in either column
    SELECT Collection_ID 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members 
    WHERE Collection_ID = best_col.Collection_ID 
       OR Related_Collection_ID = best_col.Collection_ID
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Collection_ID 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members 
    WHERE Collection_ID = best_col.Collection_ID 
       OR Related_Collection_ID = best_col.Collection_ID
) AS related
WHERE related.Collection_ID <> best_col.Collection_ID;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT related.Collection_ID) AS related_collection_count
FROM (
    -- Find all related collection IDs in either direction
    SELECT Related_Collection_ID AS Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    WHERE Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best')
    UNION
    SELECT Collection_ID AS Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    WHERE Related_Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best')
) AS related
WHERE related.Collection_ID <> (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT related.Collection_ID) AS related_collection_count
FROM (
    -- Collections where 'Best' is the related collection (i.e., Collection_ID is related to 'Best')
    SELECT csm.Collection_ID
    FROM Collections c
    JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Related_Collection_ID
    WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best'
    UNION
    -- Collections where 'Best' is the main collection (i.e., Related_Collection_ID is related to 'Best')
    SELECT csm.Related_Collection_ID AS Collection_ID
    FROM Collections c
    JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Collection_ID
    WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best'
) AS related
JOIN Collections col ON related.Collection_ID = col.Collection_ID
WHERE col.Collection_Name != 'Best';
