SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT related.Collection_ID) AS related_collection_count
FROM Collections best
JOIN Collection_Subset_Members rel1 ON best.Collection_ID = rel1.Collection_ID
JOIN Collections related ON rel1.Related_Collection_ID = related.Collection_ID
WHERE best.Collection_Name = 'Best'
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT related.Collection_ID)
FROM Collections best
JOIN Collection_Subset_Members rel2 ON best.Collection_ID = rel2.Related_Collection_ID
JOIN Collections related ON rel2.Collection_ID = related.Collection_ID
WHERE best.Collection_Name = 'Best'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT related_collection_id) AS related_collection_count
FROM (
    -- Collections where Best is the related collection (i.e., Best is the target)
    SELECT csm.Collection_ID AS related_collection_id
    FROM Collections c
    JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Related_Collection_ID
    WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best'
    UNION
    -- Collections related to Best where Best is the source
    SELECT csm.Related_Collection_ID AS related_collection_id
    FROM Collections c
    JOIN Collection_Subset_Members csm ON c.Collection_ID = csm.Collection_ID
    WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best'
) AS related_collections;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT related.Collection_ID) AS related_collection_count
FROM Collections c
JOIN Collection_Subset_Members m1 
    ON c.Collection_ID = m1.Collection_ID 
    OR c.Collection_ID = m1.Related_Collection_ID
JOIN Collection_Subset_Members m2 
    ON m1.Collection_Subset_ID = m2.Collection_Subset_ID
JOIN Collections related 
    ON (related.Collection_ID = m2.Collection_ID 
        OR related.Collection_ID = m2.Related_Collection_ID)
WHERE c.Collection_Name = 'Best'
    AND related.Collection_ID != c.Collection_ID;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT RelatedCollections.Collection_ID) AS Related_Collection_Count
FROM (
    -- Collections where Best is the main collection and we get related collections
    SELECT Related_Collection_ID AS Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    WHERE Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best')
    UNION
    -- Collections where Best is the related collection and we get main collections
    SELECT Collection_ID AS Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    WHERE Related_Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best')
) AS RelatedCollections
WHERE RelatedCollections.Collection_ID != (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best');

WITH BestCollection AS (
    SELECT Collection_ID 
    FROM Collections 
    WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best'
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT RelatedCollectionID) AS RelatedCollectionsCount
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN csm.Collection_ID = bc.Collection_ID THEN csm.Related_Collection_ID
            ELSE csm.Collection_ID
        END AS RelatedCollectionID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members csm
    CROSS JOIN BestCollection bc
    WHERE bc.Collection_ID IN (csm.Collection_ID, csm.Related_Collection_ID)
      AND NOT (csm.Collection_ID = bc.Collection_ID AND csm.Related_Collection_ID = bc.Collection_ID)
) AS RelatedIDs;

    FROM Collections 
    WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best'
),
SubsetsOfBest AS (
    SELECT Collection_Subset_ID 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members 
    WHERE Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM BestCollection)
       OR Related_Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM BestCollection)
),
AllRelatedCollectionIDs AS (
    SELECT Collection_ID AS RelatedColID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    WHERE Collection_Subset_ID IN (SELECT Collection_Subset_ID FROM SubsetsOfBest)
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Collection_ID AS RelatedColID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    WHERE Collection_Subset_ID IN (SELECT Collection_Subset_ID FROM SubsetsOfBest)
)
SELECT DISTINCT c.Collection_Name
FROM Collections c
JOIN AllRelatedCollectionIDs r ON c.Collection_ID = r.RelatedColID
WHERE c.Collection_Name != 'Best'
ORDER BY c.Collection_Name;

SELECT DISTINCT c.Collection_Name
FROM Collections c
WHERE c.Collection_ID IN (
    SELECT Related_Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    WHERE Collection_ID = (
        SELECT Collection_ID
        FROM Collections
        WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best'
    )
    UNION
    SELECT Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members
    WHERE Related_Collection_ID = (
        SELECT Collection_ID
        FROM Collections
        WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best'
    )
)
AND c.Collection_Name != 'Best';

SELECT DISTINCT c.Collection_Name
FROM Collections c
WHERE c.Collection_ID IN (
    -- Find all collection IDs related to 'Best'
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN csm.Collection_ID = best_id THEN csm.Related_Collection_ID
            WHEN csm.Related_Collection_ID = best_id THEN csm.Collection_ID
        END AS related_id
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members csm
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT Collection_ID AS best_id
        FROM Collections
        WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best'
    ) best
    WHERE csm.Collection_ID = best.best_id 
       OR csm.Related_Collection_ID = best.best_id
)
AND c.Collection_Name != 'Best';  -- Exclude 'Best' itself

SELECT DISTINCT c.Collection_Name
FROM Collections c
WHERE c.Collection_ID IN (
    SELECT Collection_ID 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members 
    WHERE Related_Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best')
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Collection_ID 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members 
    WHERE Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best')
)
AND c.Collection_ID != (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best');

SELECT DISTINCT c.Collection_Name
FROM Collections c
WHERE c.Collection_ID IN (
    SELECT m.Related_Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members m
    JOIN Collections best ON best.Collection_ID = m.Collection_ID
    WHERE best.Collection_Name = 'Best'
    UNION
    SELECT m.Collection_ID
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members m
    JOIN Collections best ON best.Collection_ID = m.Related_Collection_ID
    WHERE best.Collection_Name = 'Best'
)
AND c.Collection_Name != 'Best';

WITH best_col AS (
    SELECT Collection_ID 
    FROM Collections 
    WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best'
)
SELECT DISTINCT c.Collection_Name
FROM Collections c
WHERE c.Collection_ID IN (
    SELECT Collection_ID 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members 
    WHERE Related_Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM best_col)
    UNION
    SELECT Related_Collection_ID 
    FROM Collection_Subset_Members 
    WHERE Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM best_col)
)
AND c.Collection_ID != (SELECT Collection_ID FROM best_col);

    SELECT songs_id, COUNT(DISTINCT participant_id) AS participant_count
    FROM performance_score
    GROUP BY songs_id
) AS song_counts ON s.id = song_counts.songs_id
WHERE song_counts.participant_count = (
    SELECT MAX(participant_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT participant_id) AS participant_count
        FROM performance_score
        GROUP BY songs_id
    ) AS counts
);

WITH chicago_code AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM City 
    WHERE city_name = 'Chicago'
),
nearest_city_code AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN d.city1_code = c.city_code THEN d.city2_code
            ELSE d.city1_code
        END AS nearest_code
    FROM Direct_distance d
    CROSS JOIN chicago_code c
    WHERE (d.city1_code = c.city_code OR d.city2_code = c.city_code)
      AND d.distance > 0
    ORDER BY d.distance
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT city_name
FROM City
WHERE city_code = (SELECT nearest_code FROM nearest_city_code);

WITH ChicagoCode AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM City 
    WHERE city_name = 'Chicago'
),
DistancesFromChicago AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN d.city1_code = c.city_code THEN d.city2_code 
            ELSE d.city1_code 
        END AS other_city_code,
        d.distance
    FROM Direct_distance d
    CROSS JOIN ChicagoCode c
    WHERE (d.city1_code = c.city_code OR d.city2_code = c.city_code)
      AND d.distance > 0
),
MinDistance AS (
    SELECT MIN(distance) AS min_dist
    FROM DistancesFromChicago
)
SELECT city_name
FROM City
WHERE city_code = (
    SELECT other_city_code
    FROM DistancesFromChicago
    WHERE distance = (SELECT min_dist FROM MinDistance)
);

WITH Chicago AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM City 
    WHERE city_name = 'Chicago'
),
DistancesFromChicago AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN d.city1_code = c.city_code THEN d.city2_code 
            ELSE d.city1_code 
        END AS other_city_code,
        d.distance
    FROM Direct_distance d
    CROSS JOIN Chicago c
    WHERE (d.city1_code = c.city_code OR d.city2_code = c.city_code)
      AND d.distance > 0
)
SELECT 
    ci.city_name
FROM DistancesFromChicago dfc
JOIN City ci ON dfc.other_city_code = ci.city_code
ORDER BY dfc.distance ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH ChicagoCode AS (

    CROSS JOIN ChicagoCode c
    WHERE (d.city1_code = c.city_code OR d.city2_code = c.city_code)
      AND d.distance > 0
),
MinDistance AS (
    SELECT MIN(distance) AS min_distance
    FROM DistancesFromChicago
)
SELECT ci.city_name
FROM DistancesFromChicago dfc
JOIN MinDistance md ON dfc.distance = md.min_distance
JOIN City ci ON dfc.other_city_code = ci.city_code;

WITH Chicago AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM City 
    WHERE city_name = 'Chicago'
),
Distances AS (
    SELECT 
        d.distance,
        CASE 
            WHEN d.city1_code = c.city_code THEN d.city2_code
            ELSE d.city1_code
        END AS other_city_code
    FROM Direct_distance d
    CROSS JOIN Chicago c
    WHERE c.city_code IN (d.city1_code, d.city2_code)
)
SELECT ci.city_name
FROM Distances d
JOIN City ci ON d.other_city_code = ci.city_code
WHERE ci.city_name != 'Chicago'
ORDER BY d.distance

WITH BostonDistances AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN dd.city1_code = b.city_code THEN dd.city2_code 
            ELSE dd.city1_code 
        END AS other_city_code,
        dd.distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    CROSS JOIN (SELECT city_code FROM City WHERE city_name = 'Boston') b
    WHERE dd.city1_code = b.city_code OR dd.city2_code = b.city_code
),
MaxDistance AS (
    SELECT MAX(distance) AS max_dist FROM BostonDistances
)
SELECT c.city_name
FROM City c
JOIN BostonDistances bd ON c.city_code = bd.other_city_code
JOIN MaxDistance md ON bd.distance = md.max_dist;

WITH boston_code AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM City 
    WHERE city_name = 'Boston'
),
distances_from_boston AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN dd.city1_code = bc.city_code THEN dd.city2_code
            WHEN dd.city2_code = bc.city_code THEN dd.city1_code
        END AS other_city_code,
        dd.distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd
    CROSS JOIN boston_code bc
    WHERE bc.city_code IN (dd.city1_code, dd.city2_code)
),
max_distance AS (
    SELECT MAX(distance) AS max_dist
    FROM distances_from_boston
)
SELECT c.city_name
FROM distances_from_boston d
JOIN City c ON d.other_city_code = c.city_code
JOIN max_distance m ON d.distance = m.max_dist;

    WHERE (d.city1_code = c.city_code OR d.city2_code = c.city_code)
        AND d.distance > 0
),
MinDistance AS (
    SELECT MIN(distance) AS min_distance
    FROM DistancesFromChicago
)
SELECT ci.city_name
FROM DistancesFromChicago dfc
JOIN MinDistance md ON dfc.distance = md.min_distance
JOIN City ci ON dfc.other_city_code = ci.city_code;

WITH chicago AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM City 
    WHERE city_name = 'Chicago'
),
distances_from_chicago AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN d.city1_code = c.city_code THEN d.city2_code 
            ELSE d.city1_code 
        END AS other_city_code,
        d.distance
    FROM Direct_distance d
    CROSS JOIN chicago c
    WHERE (d.city1_code = c.city_code OR d.city2_code = c.city_code)
      AND d.distance > 0
)
SELECT city_name
FROM City
WHERE city_code = (
    SELECT other_city_code
    FROM distances_from_chicago
    ORDER BY distance
    LIMIT 1
);

WITH Chicago AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM City 
    WHERE city_name = 'Chicago'
),
ClosestCity AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN dd.city1_code = c.city_code THEN dd.city2_code
            ELSE dd.city1_code
        END AS closest_city_code,
        dd.distance
    FROM Direct_distance dd, Chicago c
    WHERE (dd.city1_code = c.city_code OR dd.city2_code = c.city_code)
      AND NOT (dd.city1_code = c.city_code AND dd.city2_code = c.city_code)
    ORDER BY dd.distance
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT city_name
FROM City
WHERE city_code = (SELECT closest_city_code FROM ClosestCity);

SELECT c2.city_name
FROM City c1
JOIN Direct_distance dd ON (c1.city_code = dd.city1_code OR c1.city_code = dd.city2_code)
JOIN City c2 ON (
    (dd.city1_code = c1.city_code AND dd.city2_code = c2.city_code) OR
    (dd.city2_code = c1.city_code AND dd.city1_code = c2.city_code)
)
WHERE c1.city_name = 'Chicago'
  AND c2.city_name != 'Chicago'
ORDER BY dd.distance
LIMIT 1;

       AND d.city2_code = (SELECT city_code FROM Tracy))
   OR (d.city1_code = (SELECT city_code FROM Tracy) 
       AND d.city2_code = (SELECT city_code FROM Linda));

  ON (dd.city1_code = s1.city_code AND dd.city2_code = s2.city_code)

    AND sc2.Fname = 'Tracy' AND sc2.LName = 'Kim'
JOIN Direct_distance d 
    ON (d.city1_code = sc1.city_code AND d.city2_code = sc2.city_code)

   OR (d.city1_code = (SELECT city_code FROM Student WHERE Fname = 'Tracy' AND LName = 'Kim')
       AND d.city2_code = (SELECT city_code FROM Student WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'));

WITH LindaCity AS (

    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
    LIMIT 1
),
TracyCity AS (
    SELECT city_code AS city2
    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Tracy' AND LName = 'Kim'
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN LindaCity.city1 = TracyCity.city2 THEN 0
        ELSE (
            SELECT distance
            FROM Direct_distance
            WHERE (city1_code = LindaCity.city1 AND city2_code = TracyCity.city2)
               OR (city1_code = TracyCity.city2 AND city2_code = LindaCity.city1)
            LIMIT 1
        )
    END AS distance
FROM LindaCity, TracyCity;

WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM Student 
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
),
StudentDistances AS (
    SELECT 
        s.Fname,
        s.LName,
        COALESCE(dd1.distance, dd2.distance) AS distance
    FROM Student s
    CROSS JOIN LindaCity lc
    LEFT JOIN Direct_distance dd1 
        ON dd1.city1_code = lc.city_code 
        AND dd2.city2_code = s.city_code
    LEFT JOIN Direct_distance dd2 
        ON dd2.city1_code = s.city_code 
        AND dd2.city2_code = lc.city_code
    WHERE s.Fname != 'Linda' OR s.LName != 'Smith'
      AND (dd1.distance IS NOT NULL OR dd2.distance IS NOT NULL)
)
SELECT Fname, LName
FROM StudentDistances
ORDER BY distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT c.latitude, c.longitude
    FROM Student s
    JOIN City c ON s.city_code = c.city_code
    WHERE s.Fname = 'Linda' AND s.Lname = 'Smith'
),
StudentDistances AS (
    SELECT 
        s.Fname,
        s.Lname,
        -- Haversine formula to calculate distance in kilometers
        6371 * ACOS(
            COS(RADIANS(lc.latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(c.latitude)) *
            COS(RADIANS(c.longitude) - RADIANS(lc.longitude)) +
            SIN(RADIANS(lc.latitude)) * SIN(RADIANS(c.latitude))
        ) AS distance
    FROM Student s
    JOIN City c ON s.city_code = c.city_code
    CROSS JOIN LindaCity lc
    WHERE NOT (s.Fname = 'Linda' AND s.Lname = 'Smith')
)
SELECT Fname, Lname
FROM StudentDistances
WHERE distance = (SELECT MAX(distance) FROM StudentDistances);

WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT city_code
    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND Lname = 'Smith'
),
DistancesFromLinda AS (
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    WHERE city1_code = (SELECT city_code FROM LindaCity)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    WHERE city2_code = (SELECT city_code FROM LindaCity)
),
MaxDistance AS (
    SELECT MAX(distance) AS max_dist
    FROM DistancesFromLinda
),
FarthestCities AS (
    SELECT city_code
    FROM DistancesFromLinda
    WHERE distance = (SELECT max_dist FROM MaxDistance)
)
SELECT s.Fname, s.Lname
FROM Student s
WHERE s.city_code IN (SELECT city_code FROM FarthestCities)
  AND NOT (s.Fname = 'Linda' AND s.Lname = 'Smith'); -- Exclude Linda Smith herself if she happens to be in the farthest city (unlikely but possible)

WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM Student 
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
),
StudentDistances AS (
    SELECT 
        s.StuID,
        s.Fname,
        s.LName,
        COALESCE(
            MAX(CASE 
                WHEN dd.city1_code = lc.city_code AND dd.city2_code = s.city_code THEN dd.distance
                WHEN dd.city2_code = lc.city_code AND dd.city1_code = s.city_code THEN dd.distance
            END),
            -1
        ) AS distance_from_linda
    FROM Student s
    CROSS JOIN LindaCity lc
    LEFT JOIN Direct_distance dd 
        ON (dd.city1_code = lc.city_code AND dd.city2_code = s.city_code)
        OR (dd.city2_code = lc.city_code AND dd.city1_code = s.city_code)
    WHERE s.Fname != 'Linda' OR s.LName != 'Smith'
    GROUP BY s.StuID, s.Fname, s.LName
)
SELECT Fname, LName
FROM StudentDistances
WHERE distance_from_linda = (SELECT MAX(distance_from_linda) FROM StudentDistances)
  AND distance_from_linda != -1;

WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT city_code
    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
),
Distances AS (
    SELECT 
        s.StuID,
        s.Fname,
        s.LName,
        COALESCE(dd.distance, 0) AS distance_to_linda
    FROM Student s
    CROSS JOIN LindaCity lc
    LEFT JOIN Direct_distance dd ON 
        (s.city_code = dd.city1_code AND lc.city_code = dd.city2_code)
        OR (s.city_code = dd.city2_code AND lc.city_code = dd.city1_code)
    WHERE NOT (s.Fname = 'Linda' AND s.LName = 'Smith')
)
SELECT Fname, LName
FROM Distances
WHERE distance_to_linda = (SELECT MAX(distance_to_linda) FROM Distances);

SELECT 
    c.city_name,
    AVG(dd.distance) AS avg_distance_to_other_cities
FROM City c
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
) dd ON c.city_code = dd.city_code
WHERE dd.distance IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.city_code, c.city_name
ORDER BY c.city_name;

SELECT 
    c.city_name,
    AVG(ud.distance) AS avg_distance_to_other_cities
FROM City c
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, city2_code AS other_city, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    WHERE city1_code != city2_code
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, city1_code AS other_city, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    WHERE city1_code != city2_code
) ud ON c.city_code = ud.city_code
GROUP BY c.city_code, c.city_name
ORDER BY c.city_name;

WITH city_pairs AS (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, city2_code AS other_city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    WHERE city1_code <> city2_code
    UNION
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, city1_code AS other_city_code, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    WHERE city1_code <> city2_code
)
SELECT 
    c.city_name,
    AVG(cp.distance) AS avg_distance_to_other_cities
FROM City c
LEFT JOIN city_pairs cp ON c.city_code = cp.city_code
GROUP BY c.city_code, c.city_name
ORDER BY c.city_name;

WITH DirectedDistances AS (
    SELECT city1_code AS city_code, city2_code AS other_city, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    WHERE city1_code <> city2_code
    UNION
    SELECT city2_code AS city_code, city1_code AS other_city, distance
    FROM Direct_distance
    WHERE city1_code <> city2_code
),
CityAvg AS (
    SELECT city_code, AVG(distance) AS avg_distance
    FROM DirectedDistances
    GROUP BY city_code
)
SELECT c.city_name, ca.avg_distance
FROM City c
LEFT JOIN CityAvg ca ON c.city_code = ca.city_code
ORDER BY c.city_name;

SELECT 
    c.city_name,
    AVG(dd.distance) AS avg_distance_to_other_cities
FROM City c
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT city1_code AS from_code, city2_code AS to_code, distance 
    FROM Direct_distance 
    WHERE city1_code != city2_code
    UNION ALL
    SELECT city2_code AS from_code, city1_code AS to_code, distance 
    FROM Direct_distance 
    WHERE city1_code != city2_code
) dd ON c.city_code = dd.from_code
GROUP BY c.city_code, c.city_name
ORDER BY c.city_name;

    SELECT city_code
    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
),
Distances AS (
    SELECT 
        s.StuID,
        s.Fname,
        s.LName,
        COALESCE(d1.distance, d2.distance) AS distance
    FROM Student s
    CROSS JOIN LindaCity lc
    LEFT JOIN Direct_distance d1 ON d1.city1_code = lc.city_code AND d1.city2_code = s.city_code
    LEFT JOIN Direct_distance d2 ON d2.city2_code = lc.city_code AND d2.city1_code = s.city_code
    WHERE s.Fname != 'Linda' OR s.LName != 'Smith'
)
SELECT Fname || ' ' || LName AS full_name
FROM Distances
WHERE distance = (SELECT MAX(distance) FROM Distances)
LIMIT 1;

WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT city_code
    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    s.Fname || ' ' || s.LName AS full_name
FROM Student s
CROSS JOIN LindaCity lc
LEFT JOIN Direct_distance dd ON 
    (dd.city1_code = s.city_code AND dd.city2_code = lc.city_code) OR
    (dd.city1_code = lc.city_code AND dd.city2_code = s.city_code)
WHERE NOT (s.Fname = 'Linda' AND s.LName = 'Smith')
ORDER BY COALESCE(dd.distance, 0) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM Student 
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    s.Fname || ' ' || s.Lname AS full_name
FROM Student s
JOIN LindaCity lc ON 1=1
JOIN Direct_distance dd ON 
    (dd.city1_code = lc.city_code AND dd.city2_code = s.city_code)
    OR (dd.city2_code = lc.city_code AND dd.city1_code = s.city_code)
WHERE NOT (s.Fname = 'Linda' AND s.Lname = 'Smith')
ORDER BY dd.distance DESC
LIMIT 1;

            FROM 
                Author_list al2

WITH author_paper_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        al.author_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.paper_id) AS paper_count
    FROM 
        Paper p
    INNER JOIN 
        Author_list al ON p.paper_id = al.paper_id
    WHERE 
        p.year = 2009
    GROUP BY 
        al.author_id
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS author_name,
    apc.paper_count
FROM 
    author_paper_counts apc
INNER JOIN 
    Author a ON apc.author_id = a.author_id
WHERE 
    apc.paper_count = (SELECT MAX(paper_count) FROM author_paper_counts)
ORDER BY 
    a.name;

SELECT 
    a.author_id,
    a.name,
    COUNT(*) AS paper_count
FROM 
    Paper p
    JOIN Author_list al ON p.paper_id = al.paper_id
    JOIN Author a ON al.author_id = a.author_id
WHERE 
    p.year = 2009
GROUP BY 
    a.author_id, a.name
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(cnt)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM Paper p2
            JOIN Author_list al2 ON p2.paper_id = al2.paper_id
            WHERE p2.year = 2009
            GROUP BY al2.author_id
        ) AS counts
    )
ORDER BY 
    a.author_id;

WITH PaperCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        al.author_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT al.paper_id) AS num_papers
    FROM 
        Author_list al
    INNER JOIN 
        Paper p ON al.paper_id = p.paper_id
    WHERE 
        p.year = 2009
    GROUP BY 
        al.author_id
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(num_papers) AS max_papers
    FROM 
        PaperCounts
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS author_name,
    pc.num_papers
FROM 
    PaperCounts pc
INNER JOIN 
    Author a ON pc.author_id = a.author_id
INNER JOIN 
    MaxCount mc ON pc.num_papers = mc.max_papers
ORDER BY 
    a.name;

SELECT 
    a.name AS author_name,
    COUNT(*) AS paper_count
FROM 
    Paper p
    JOIN Author_list al ON p.paper_id = al.paper_id
    JOIN Author a ON al.author_id = a.author_id
WHERE 
    p.year = 2009
GROUP BY 
    a.author_id, a.name
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(cnt)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM Paper p2
            JOIN Author_list al2 ON p2.paper_id = al2.paper_id
            WHERE p2.year = 2009
            GROUP BY al2.author_id
        ) AS counts
    )
ORDER BY 
    author_name;

FROM Author a

GROUP BY a.author_id, a.name
ORDER BY citation_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT a.name, sub.citation_count
FROM (
    SELECT al.author_id, COUNT(*) AS citation_count
    FROM Author_list al
    JOIN Citation c ON al.paper_id = c.cited_paper_id
    GROUP BY al.author_id
    ORDER BY citation_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
) sub
JOIN Author a ON sub.author_id = a.author_id;

        al.author_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS citation_count
    FROM Author_list al
    JOIN Citation c ON al.paper_id = c.cited_paper_id
    GROUP BY al.author_id
),
RankedAuthors AS (
    SELECT 
        author_id, 
        citation_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY citation_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM AuthorCitations
)
SELECT 
    a.name, 
    ra.citation_count
FROM RankedAuthors ra
JOIN Author a ON ra.author_id = a.author_id
WHERE ra.rank = 1;

    SELECT paper_id, COUNT(author_id) AS author_count
    FROM Author_list
    GROUP BY paper_id
) ac ON p.paper_id = ac.paper_id
WHERE ac.author_count = (
    SELECT MAX(author_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(author_id) AS author_count
        FROM Author_list
        GROUP BY paper_id
    ) counts
);

),
max_count AS (

)

1034:
WITH mckeown_papers AS (
    SELECT paper_id
    FROM Author_list
    WHERE author_id = (
        SELECT author_id
        FROM Author
        WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen'
    )
),
coauthor_counts AS (
    SELECT al.author_id, COUNT(DISTINCT al.paper_id) AS coauthored_paper_count
    FROM Author_list al
    INNER JOIN mckeown_papers mp ON al.paper_id = mp.paper_id
    WHERE al.author_id <> (
        SELECT author_id
        FROM Author
        WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen'
    )
    GROUP BY al.author_id
)
SELECT a.name
FROM coauthor_counts cc
JOIN Author a ON cc.author_id = a.author_id
ORDER BY cc.coauthored_paper_count DESC

WITH kathleen_papers AS (

    FROM Author_list
    WHERE author_id = (SELECT author_id FROM Author WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen')
),
coauthor_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        al.author_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT al.paper_id) AS joint_paper_count
    FROM Author_list al
    INNER JOIN kathleen_papers kp ON al.paper_id = kp.paper_id
    WHERE al.author_id != (SELECT author_id FROM Author WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen')
    GROUP BY al.author_id
),
ranked_coauthors AS (
    SELECT 
        author_id,
        joint_paper_count,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY joint_paper_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM coauthor_counts
)
SELECT 
    a.name,
    rc.joint_paper_count
FROM ranked_coauthors rc
JOIN Author a ON rc.author_id = a.author_id
WHERE rc.rank = 1
ORDER BY a.name;

),

SELECT a.name, cc.coauthored_paper_count
FROM coauthor_counts cc
JOIN Author a ON cc.author_id = a.author_id
WHERE cc.coauthored_paper_count = (SELECT MAX(coauthored_paper_count) FROM coauthor_counts)
ORDER BY cc.coauthored_paper_count DESC;

WITH kathleen AS (
    SELECT author_id 
    FROM Author 
    WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen'
),
her_papers AS (
    SELECT paper_id 
    FROM Author_list 
    WHERE author_id = (SELECT author_id FROM kathleen)
),
coauthor_counts AS (
    SELECT al.author_id, COUNT(DISTINCT al.paper_id) AS paper_count
    FROM Author_list al
    INNER JOIN her_papers hp ON al.paper_id = hp.paper_id
    WHERE al.author_id != (SELECT author_id FROM kathleen)
    GROUP BY al.author_id
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(paper_count) AS max_paper_count
    FROM coauthor_counts
)
SELECT a.name, cc.paper_count
FROM coauthor_counts cc
JOIN Author a ON cc.author_id = a.author_id
WHERE cc.paper_count = (SELECT max_paper_count FROM max_count)
ORDER BY cc.paper_count DESC;

SELECT a.name
FROM Author a
WHERE a.author_id IN (
    SELECT al.author_id
    FROM Author_list al
    WHERE al.paper_id IN (
        SELECT paper_id 
        FROM Author_list 
        WHERE author_id = (SELECT author_id FROM Author WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen')
    )
    AND al.author_id != (SELECT author_id FROM Author WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen')
    GROUP BY al.author_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(coauthored_paper_count) 
        FROM (
            SELECT al2.author_id, COUNT(*) as coauthored_paper_count
            FROM Author_list al2
            WHERE al2.paper_id IN (
                SELECT paper_id 
                FROM Author_list 
                WHERE author_id = (SELECT author_id FROM Author WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen')
            )
            AND al2.author_id != (SELECT author_id FROM Author WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen')
            GROUP BY al2.author_id
        ) AS max_counts
    )
);

WITH coauthor_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        al2.author_id, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT al2.paper_id) AS coauthored_paper_count
    FROM Author_list al1
    JOIN Author_list al2 ON al1.paper_id = al2.paper_id
    WHERE al1.author_id = (SELECT author_id FROM Author WHERE name = 'Mckeown , Kathleen')
        AND al2.author_id != al1.author_id
    GROUP BY al2.author_id
)
SELECT 
    a.author_id, 
    a.name, 
    cc.coauthored_paper_count
FROM coauthor_counts cc
JOIN Author a ON cc.author_id = a.author_id
WHERE cc.coauthored_paper_count = (SELECT MAX(coauthored_paper_count) FROM coauthor_counts)
ORDER BY a.name;

    FROM conference c

FROM (
    SELECT 
        h.plane_name,
        COUNT(ps.pilot_name) AS pilot_count
    FROM Hangar h
    LEFT JOIN PilotSkills ps ON h.plane_name = ps.plane_name
    GROUP BY h.plane_name
) AS plane_counts

    SELECT MIN(pilot_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            h.plane_name,

1228:
WITH ArtistLifespan AS (
    SELECT 
        artistID,
        fname,
        lname,
        (deathYear - birthYear) AS lifespan
    FROM Artists
    WHERE birthYear IS NOT NULL 
      AND deathYear IS NOT NULL
),
MaxLifespan AS (
    SELECT MAX(lifespan) AS max_lifespan
    FROM ArtistLifespan
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS number_of_paintings
FROM Paintings p
WHERE p.painterID IN (
    SELECT artistID
    FROM ArtistLifespan
    WHERE lifespan = (SELECT max_lifespan FROM MaxLifespan)
);

WITH ArtistLifespan AS (
    SELECT 
        artistID,
        fname,
        lname,
        (deathYear - birthYear) AS lifespan
    FROM Artists
    WHERE deathYear IS NOT NULL 
        AND birthYear IS NOT NULL
),
MaxLifespan AS (
    SELECT MAX(lifespan) AS max_lifespan
    FROM ArtistLifespan
),
ArtistWithLongestLife AS (
    SELECT artistID
    FROM ArtistLifespan
    WHERE lifespan = (SELECT max_lifespan FROM MaxLifespan)
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS number_of_paintings
FROM Paintings
WHERE painterID IN (SELECT artistID FROM ArtistWithLongestLife);

WITH ArtistLifespan AS (
    SELECT 
        artistID,
        (deathYear - birthYear) AS lifespan
    FROM Artists
    WHERE birthYear IS NOT NULL 
        AND deathYear IS NOT NULL
),
MaxLifespan AS (
    SELECT MAX(lifespan) AS max_lifespan
    FROM ArtistLifespan
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS painting_count
FROM Paintings
WHERE painterID IN (
    SELECT artistID
    FROM ArtistLifespan
    WHERE lifespan = (SELECT max_lifespan FROM MaxLifespan)
);

WITH ArtistLife AS (
    SELECT 
        artistID,
        (deathYear - birthYear) AS lifeSpan
    FROM Artists
    WHERE deathYear IS NOT NULL 
        AND birthYear IS NOT NULL
),
MaxLife AS (
    SELECT MAX(lifeSpan) AS maxLifeSpan
    FROM ArtistLife
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS painting_count
FROM Paintings
WHERE painterID IN (
    SELECT artistID
    FROM ArtistLife
    WHERE lifeSpan = (SELECT maxLifeSpan FROM MaxLife)
);

WITH ArtistLifespan AS (
    SELECT artistID, (deathYear - birthYear) AS lifespan
    FROM Artists
    WHERE birthYear IS NOT NULL AND deathYear IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT COUNT(p.paintingID) AS num_paintings
FROM Paintings p
WHERE p.painterID IN (
    SELECT artistID
    FROM ArtistLifespan
    WHERE lifespan = (SELECT MAX(lifespan) FROM ArtistLifespan)
);

    AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.medium = 'lithographic' THEN 1 END) > 0;

)

SELECT a.deathYear
FROM Artists a
JOIN (
    SELECT sculptorID, COUNT(*) AS sculpture_count
    FROM Sculptures
    GROUP BY sculptorID
) sc ON a.artistID = sc.sculptorID
WHERE sc.sculpture_count = (
    SELECT MIN(sculpture_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS sculpture_count
        FROM Sculptures
        GROUP BY sculptorID
    ) AS counts
);

WITH SculptureCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        sculptorID AS artistID,
        COUNT(*) AS num_sculptures
    FROM Sculptures
    GROUP BY sculptorID
)
SELECT 
    a.deathYear
FROM Artists a
JOIN SculptureCounts sc ON a.artistID = sc.artistID
WHERE sc.num_sculptures = (
    SELECT MIN(num_sculptures) 
    FROM SculptureCounts
);

    FROM Sculptures
    GROUP BY sculptorID

MinCount AS (

    FROM SculptureCounts
)
SELECT a.deathYear
FROM Artists a

SELECT 
    a.fname, 
    a.lname, 
    COUNT(p.paintingID) AS oil_painting_count
FROM 
    Artists a
    JOIN Paintings p ON a.artistID = p.painterID
WHERE 
    p.medium = 'oil'
GROUP BY 
    a.artistID, a.fname, a.lname
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.paintingID) = (
        SELECT MAX(count_oil) 
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(p2.paintingID) AS count_oil
            FROM Paintings p2
            WHERE p2.medium = 'oil'
            GROUP BY p2.painterID
        ) AS counts
    )
ORDER BY 
    oil_painting_count DESC;

WITH OilPaintingCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        a.artistID,
        a.fname,
        a.lname,
        COUNT(p.paintingID) AS oil_count
    FROM Artists a
    JOIN Paintings p ON a.artistID = p.painterID
    WHERE LOWER(p.medium) LIKE '%oil%'
    GROUP BY a.artistID, a.fname, a.lname
)
SELECT 
    fname,
    lname,
    oil_count
FROM OilPaintingCounts
WHERE oil_count = (SELECT MAX(oil_count) FROM OilPaintingCounts)
ORDER BY lname, fname;

SELECT 
    a.fname, 
    a.lname
FROM 
    Artists a
    JOIN Paintings p ON a.artistID = p.painterID
WHERE 
    p.medium = 'oil'
GROUP BY 
    a.artistID, a.fname, a.lname
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(cnt)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM Paintings
            WHERE medium = 'oil'
            GROUP BY painterID
        ) AS counts
    )
ORDER BY 
    a.lname, a.fname;

WITH OilPaintings AS (
    SELECT 
        a.artistID,
        a.fname,
        a.lname,
        COUNT(p.paintingID) AS oil_count
    FROM 
        Artists a
    JOIN 
        Paintings p ON a.artistID = p.painterID
    WHERE 
        p.medium LIKE '%oil%'
    GROUP BY 
        a.artistID, a.fname, a.lname
),
MaxOil AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(oil_count) AS max_count
    FROM 
        OilPaintings
)
SELECT 
    fname,
    lname,
    oil_count
FROM 
    OilPaintings
WHERE 
    oil_count = (SELECT max_count FROM MaxOil)
ORDER BY 
    lname, fname;

SELECT 
    a.artistID,
    a.fname,
    a.lname,
    COUNT(p.paintingID) AS oil_painting_count
FROM 
    Artists a
    JOIN Paintings p ON a.artistID = p.painterID
WHERE 
    p.medium = 'oil'
GROUP BY 
    a.artistID, a.fname, a.lname
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.paintingID) = (
        SELECT MAX(cnt)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(p2.paintingID) AS cnt
            FROM Paintings p2
            WHERE p2.medium = 'oil'
            GROUP BY p2.painterID
        ) AS counts
    )
ORDER BY 
    oil_painting_count DESC;

SELECT 
    c.name AS country_name,
    COUNT(ol.language_id) AS num_official_languages
FROM 
    official_languages ol
JOIN 
    countries c ON ol.country_id = c.id
GROUP BY 
    ol.country_id, c.name
ORDER BY 
    num_official_languages DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.name AS country_name,
    COUNT(ol.language_id) AS num_official_languages
FROM 
    countries c
JOIN 
    official_languages ol ON c.id = ol.country_id
GROUP BY 
    c.id, c.name
HAVING 
    COUNT(ol.language_id) = (
        SELECT MAX(lang_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(language_id) AS lang_count
            FROM official_languages
            GROUP BY country_id
        ) AS counts
    );

SELECT 
    c.name AS country_name,
    COUNT(*) AS num_official_languages
FROM 
    official_languages ol
JOIN 
    countries c ON ol.country_id = c.id
GROUP BY 
    ol.country_id
ORDER BY 
    num_official_languages DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.name, COUNT(*) AS num_languages
FROM official_languages ol
JOIN countries c ON ol.country_id = c.id
GROUP BY ol.country_id
ORDER BY num_languages DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH lang_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        country_id, 
        COUNT(language_id) AS num_languages
    FROM official_languages
    GROUP BY country_id
)
SELECT 
    c.name AS country_name
FROM countries c
JOIN lang_counts lc ON c.id = lc.country_id
WHERE lc.num_languages = (SELECT MAX(num_languages) FROM lang_counts);

SELECT 
    f.feature_name,
    f.feature_description
FROM 
    Property_Features pf
JOIN 
    Features f ON pf.feature_id = f.feature_id
GROUP BY 
    pf.feature_id, f.feature_name, f.feature_description
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f.feature_name, f.feature_description
FROM Features f
JOIN (
    SELECT feature_id, COUNT(*) AS feature_count
    FROM Property_Features
    GROUP BY feature_id
    ORDER BY feature_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS most_common ON f.feature_id = most_common.feature_id;

WITH FeatureCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        feature_id,
        COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
    FROM Property_Features
    GROUP BY feature_id
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(occurrence_count) AS max_count
    FROM FeatureCounts
)
SELECT 
    f.feature_name,
    f.feature_description
FROM Features f
JOIN FeatureCounts fc ON f.feature_id = fc.feature_id
JOIN MaxCount mc ON fc.occurrence_count = mc.max_count;

SELECT 
    f.feature_name, 
    f.feature_description
FROM Features f
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        feature_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS freq
    FROM Property_Features
    GROUP BY feature_id
) counts ON f.feature_id = counts.feature_id
WHERE counts.freq = (
    SELECT MAX(freq)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS freq
        FROM Property_Features
        GROUP BY feature_id
    ) t
);

SELECT 
    f.feature_name,
    f.feature_description
FROM Features f
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        feature_id,
        COUNT(*) AS feature_count
    FROM Property_Features
    GROUP BY feature_id
) AS counts ON f.feature_id = counts.feature_id
WHERE counts.feature_count = (
    SELECT MAX(feature_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS feature_count
        FROM Property_Features
        GROUP BY feature_id
    ) AS max_counts
);

SELECT f.feature_name, f.feature_description
FROM Features f
JOIN (
    SELECT feature_id, COUNT(DISTINCT property_id) AS property_count
    FROM Property_Features
    GROUP BY feature_id
    ORDER BY property_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS most_common ON f.feature_id = most_common.feature_id;

WITH FeatureCounts AS (
    SELECT feature_id, COUNT(DISTINCT property_id) AS property_count
    FROM Property_Features
    GROUP BY feature_id
),
RankedFeatures AS (
    SELECT feature_id, property_count,
           RANK() OVER (ORDER BY property_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM FeatureCounts
)
SELECT f.feature_name, f.feature_description
FROM RankedFeatures rf
JOIN Features f ON rf.feature_id = f.feature_id
WHERE rf.rank = 1;

    SELECT owner_user_id, COUNT(*) AS property_count

    ORDER BY property_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS top_owner ON u.user_id = top_owner.owner_user_id;

    SELECT owner_user_id, COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
) AS prop_counts ON u.user_id = prop_counts.owner_user_id
WHERE prop_counts.property_count = (
    SELECT MAX(property_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS property_count
        FROM Properties
        GROUP BY owner_user_id
    ) AS max_counts
);

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.room_count AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS average_rooms
FROM Properties p
WHERE p.property_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT pf.property_id
    FROM Property_Features pf
    INNER JOIN Features f ON pf.feature_id = f.feature_id
    WHERE f.feature_name = 'garden'
      AND p.room_count IS NOT NULL
      AND p.room_count != ''
);

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.room_count AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_rooms
FROM Properties p
WHERE p.property_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT pf.property_id
    FROM Property_Features pf
    JOIN Features f ON pf.feature_id = f.feature_id
    WHERE LOWER(f.feature_name) LIKE '%garden%'
);

SELECT AVG(room_count) AS average_rooms
FROM (
    SELECT p.property_id, COUNT(r.room_number) AS room_count
    FROM Properties p
    LEFT JOIN Rooms r ON p.property_id = r.property_id
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM Property_Features pf
        INNER JOIN Features f ON pf.feature_id = f.feature_id
        WHERE pf.property_id = p.property_id
        AND LOWER(f.feature_name) LIKE '%garden%'
    )
    GROUP BY p.property_id
) AS property_rooms;

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.room_count AS UNSIGNED)) AS average_rooms
FROM Properties p
WHERE p.property_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT pf.property_id
    FROM Property_Features pf
    JOIN Features f ON pf.feature_id = f.feature_id
    WHERE LOWER(f.feature_name) LIKE '%garden%'
);

WITH garden_properties AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT pf.property_id
    FROM Property_Features pf
    JOIN Features f ON pf.feature_id = f.feature_id
    WHERE LOWER(f.feature_name) LIKE '%garden%'
)
SELECT AVG(room_count) AS avg_rooms
FROM (
    SELECT gp.property_id, COUNT(r.room_number) AS room_count
    FROM garden_properties gp
    LEFT JOIN Rooms r ON gp.property_id = r.property_id
    GROUP BY gp.property_id
) t;

    ON u.user_address_id = p.property_address_id 
    AND u.user_id = p.owner_user_id;

    CONCAT(Users.first_name, 
           COALESCE(CONCAT(' ', Users.middle_name), ''), 
           ' ', 
           Users.last_name) AS full_name
FROM Users
INNER JOIN Properties 
    ON Users.user_address_id = Properties.property_address_id
    AND Properties.owner_user_id = Users.user_id;

SELECT DISTINCT 
    CONCAT(U.first_name, 
           CASE WHEN U.middle_name IS NOT NULL AND U.middle_name != '' 
                THEN CONCAT(' ', U.middle_name) 
                ELSE '' 
           END, 
           ' ', 
           U.last_name) AS full_name
FROM Users U
INNER JOIN Properties P 
    ON U.user_id = P.owner_user_id 
    AND U.user_address_id = P.property_address_id;

1469:
WITH user_searches AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
),
user_properties AS (
    SELECT 
        owner_user_id AS user_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
)
SELECT 
    u.user_id, 
    u.last_name
FROM Users u
INNER JOIN user_properties up ON u.user_id = up.user_id
LEFT JOIN user_searches us ON u.user_id = us.user_id
WHERE COALESCE(us.search_count, 0) <= 2
ORDER BY u.user_id;

WITH PropertyCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        owner_user_id AS user_id,
        COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
),
SearchCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT 
    u.user_id,
    u.last_name
FROM Users u
INNER JOIN PropertyCounts pc ON u.user_id = pc.user_id
LEFT JOIN SearchCounts sc ON u.user_id = sc.user_id
WHERE COALESCE(sc.search_count, 0) <= 2;

WITH search_counts AS (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
),
property_counts AS (
    SELECT owner_user_id AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
)
SELECT u.user_id, u.last_name
FROM Users u
LEFT JOIN search_counts sc ON u.user_id = sc.user_id
INNER JOIN property_counts pc ON u.user_id = pc.user_id
WHERE (sc.search_count <= 2 OR sc.search_count IS NULL) 
  AND pc.property_count >= 2;

WITH UserSearchCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        u.user_id,
        COALESCE(COUNT(us.search_seq), 0) AS search_count
    FROM Users u
    LEFT JOIN User_Searches us ON u.user_id = us.user_id
    GROUP BY u.user_id
),
UserPropertyCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        owner_user_id AS user_id,
        COUNT(property_id) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(property_id) >= 2
)
SELECT 
    u.user_id,
    u.last_name
FROM Users u
INNER JOIN UserPropertyCounts upc ON u.user_id = upc.user_id
INNER JOIN UserSearchCounts usc ON u.user_id = usc.user_id
WHERE usc.search_count <= 2
ORDER BY u.user_id;

WITH property_owners AS (
    SELECT owner_user_id AS user_id
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
),
search_counts AS (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT u.user_id, u.last_name
FROM Users u
INNER JOIN property_owners po ON u.user_id = po.user_id
LEFT JOIN search_counts sc ON u.user_id = sc.user_id
WHERE COALESCE(sc.search_count, 0) <= 2
ORDER BY u.user_id;

    FROM cyclists_own_bikes
    GROUP BY cyclist_id
)

    FROM (

        FROM cyclists_own_bikes
        GROUP BY cyclist_id
    ) AS counts
);

WITH bike_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        cyclist_id, 
        COUNT(bike_id) AS num_bikes
    FROM cyclists_own_bikes
    GROUP BY cyclist_id
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_bikes) AS max_num
    FROM bike_counts
)
SELECT 
    c.id, 
    c.name
FROM cyclist c
JOIN bike_counts bc ON c.id = bc.cyclist_id
JOIN max_count mc ON bc.num_bikes = mc.max_num;

SELECT 
    u.user_id,
    u.last_name
FROM Users u
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT owner_user_id, COUNT(*) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
) p ON u.user_id = p.owner_user_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
) s ON u.user_id = s.user_id
WHERE COALESCE(s.search_count, 0) <= 2;

WITH UserPropertyCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        owner_user_id AS user_id,
        COUNT(property_id) AS property_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(property_id) >= 2
),
UserSearchCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT 
    u.user_id,
    u.last_name
FROM Users u
INNER JOIN UserPropertyCounts upc ON u.user_id = upc.user_id
LEFT JOIN UserSearchCounts usc ON u.user_id = usc.user_id
WHERE COALESCE(usc.search_count, 0) <= 2
ORDER BY u.user_id;

WITH property_owners AS (
    SELECT owner_user_id AS user_id
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
),
search_counts AS (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT u.user_id, u.last_name
FROM Users u
INNER JOIN property_owners po ON u.user_id = po.user_id
LEFT JOIN search_counts sc ON u.user_id = sc.user_id
WHERE sc.search_count <= 2 OR sc.search_count IS NULL;

SELECT u.user_id, u.last_name
FROM Users u
LEFT JOIN Properties p ON u.user_id = p.owner_user_id
LEFT JOIN User_Searches us ON u.user_id = us.user_id
GROUP BY u.user_id, u.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.property_id) >= 2 
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT us.search_seq) <= 2;

SELECT u.user_id, u.last_name
FROM Users u
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT owner_user_id, COUNT(*) AS prop_count
    FROM Properties
    GROUP BY owner_user_id
) p ON u.user_id = p.owner_user_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS search_count
    FROM User_Searches
    GROUP BY user_id
) s ON u.user_id = s.user_id
WHERE COALESCE(p.prop_count, 0) >= 2
  AND COALESCE(s.search_count, 0) <= 2;

JOIN receipts r ON c.Id = r.CustomerId
JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
WHERE g.Food = 'Bakery'
GROUP BY c.Id, c.LastName
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT r.ReceiptNumber) > 10;

SELECT c.LastName
FROM customers c
WHERE c.Id IN (
    SELECT r.CustomerId
    FROM receipts r
    WHERE r.ReceiptNumber IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT i.Receipt
        FROM items i
        JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
        WHERE g.Food = 'Bakery'
    )
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT r.ReceiptNumber) > 10
);

WITH MaxPrice AS (
    SELECT MAX(Price) AS max_price FROM goods
),
ExpensiveGoods AS (
    SELECT Id FROM goods WHERE Price = (SELECT max_price FROM MaxPrice)
),
ReceiptsWithExpensiveGoods AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT Receipt 
    FROM items 
    WHERE Item IN (SELECT Id FROM ExpensiveGoods)
)
SELECT r.ReceiptNumber, r.Date
FROM receipts r
WHERE r.ReceiptNumber IN (SELECT Receipt FROM ReceiptsWithExpensiveGoods);

FROM receipts r
JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
WHERE g.Price = (SELECT MAX(Price) FROM goods);

1517:
WITH purchase_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        g.Id,
        g.Food,
        g.Flavor,
        COUNT(*) AS times_bought
    FROM items i
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY g.Id, g.Food, g.Flavor
)
SELECT 
    Id,
    Food,
    Flavor,
    times_bought
FROM purchase_counts
WHERE times_bought = (
    SELECT MIN(times_bought) 
    FROM purchase_counts
);

SELECT 
    g.Id,
    g.Food,
    g.Flavor,
    COUNT(i.Item) AS purchase_count
FROM goods g
JOIN items i ON g.Id = i.Item
GROUP BY g.Id, g.Food, g.Flavor
HAVING COUNT(i.Item) = (
    SELECT MIN(item_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(Item) AS item_count
        FROM items
        GROUP BY Item
    ) AS counts
);

WITH item_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        Item,
        COUNT(*) AS purchase_count
    FROM items
    GROUP BY Item
),
min_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(purchase_count) AS min_purchase
    FROM item_counts
)
SELECT 
    g.Id AS item_id,
    g.Flavor,
    g.Food,
    ic.purchase_count
FROM item_counts ic
JOIN goods g ON ic.Item = g.Id
JOIN min_count mc ON ic.purchase_count = mc.min_purchase
ORDER BY g.Id;

WITH item_counts AS (
    SELECT Item, COUNT(*) AS purchase_count
    FROM items
    GROUP BY Item
),
min_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(purchase_count) AS min_purchase
    FROM item_counts
)
SELECT g.Id, g.Flavor, g.Food, ic.purchase_count
FROM goods g
JOIN item_counts ic ON g.Id = ic.Item
JOIN min_count mc ON ic.purchase_count = mc.min_purchase;

SELECT g.Id, g.Flavor, g.Food
FROM goods g
JOIN (
    SELECT Item, COUNT(*) AS purchase_count
    FROM items
    GROUP BY Item
) item_counts ON g.Id = item_counts.Item
WHERE item_counts.purchase_count = (
    SELECT MIN(purchase_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS purchase_count
        FROM items
        GROUP BY Item
    )
);
1518:
WITH purchase_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        Item,
        COUNT(*) AS times_bought
    FROM items
    GROUP BY Item
),
min_count AS (
    SELECT MIN(times_bought) AS min_times
    FROM purchase_counts
)
SELECT 
    g.Id AS item_id,
    g.Food,
    g.Flavor,
    pc.times_bought
FROM purchase_counts pc
JOIN goods g ON pc.Item = g.Id
JOIN min_count mc ON pc.times_bought = mc.min_times
ORDER BY g.Id;

SELECT 
    g.Id AS ItemId,
    g.Flavor,
    g.Food,
    COUNT(i.Item) AS PurchaseCount
FROM items i
JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
GROUP BY i.Item
HAVING COUNT(i.Item) = (
    SELECT MIN(purchase_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS purchase_count
        FROM items
        GROUP BY Item
    ) AS counts
)
ORDER BY g.Id;

WITH purchase_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        Item, 
        COUNT(*) AS times_bought
    FROM items
    GROUP BY Item
)
SELECT 
    g.Id AS item_id,
    g.Food,
    g.Flavor,
    pc.times_bought
FROM purchase_counts pc
JOIN goods g ON pc.Item = g.Id
WHERE pc.times_bought = (SELECT MIN(times_bought) FROM purchase_counts)
ORDER BY g.Id;

SELECT 
    g.Id,
    g.Flavor,
    g.Food,
    item_counts.purchase_count
FROM 
    (SELECT 
         Item,
         COUNT(*) AS purchase_count
     FROM items
     GROUP BY Item) AS item_counts
JOIN goods g ON item_counts.Item = g.Id
WHERE 
    item_counts.purchase_count = (
        SELECT MIN(purchase_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS purchase_count
            FROM items
            GROUP BY Item
        ) AS counts
    )
ORDER BY g.Id;

SELECT 
    g.Id AS ItemId,
    g.Flavor,
    g.Food,
    COUNT(*) AS PurchaseCount
FROM items i
JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
GROUP BY g.Id, g.Flavor, g.Food
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MIN(item_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS item_count
        FROM items
        GROUP BY Item
    ) AS counts
)
ORDER BY g.Id;

    SELECT i.Receipt

    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    WHERE g.Flavor = 'Apple' AND g.Food = 'Pie'
    UNION
    SELECT r2.ReceiptNumber
    FROM receipts r2
    WHERE r2.CustomerId = 12
)
ORDER BY r.ReceiptNumber;

SELECT 
    c.FirstName || ' ' || c.LastName AS CustomerName,
    COUNT(r.ReceiptNumber) AS TimesShopped
FROM receipts r
JOIN customers c ON r.CustomerId = c.Id
GROUP BY r.CustomerId
ORDER BY TimesShopped DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH CustomerReceiptCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerId,
        COUNT(*) AS shopping_count
    FROM receipts
    GROUP BY CustomerId
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(shopping_count) AS max_count
    FROM CustomerReceiptCounts
)
SELECT 
    c.Id,
    c.FirstName,
    c.LastName,
    crc.shopping_count AS times_shopped
FROM customers c
JOIN CustomerReceiptCounts crc ON c.Id = crc.CustomerId
JOIN MaxCount mc ON crc.shopping_count = mc.max_count
ORDER BY c.Id;

SELECT 
    c.FirstName, 
    c.LastName, 
    COUNT(r.ReceiptNumber) AS TimesShopped
FROM 
    receipts r
    JOIN customers c ON r.CustomerId = c.Id
GROUP BY 
    c.Id, c.FirstName, c.LastName
ORDER BY 
    TimesShopped DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH customer_visits AS (
    SELECT CustomerId, COUNT(*) AS visit_count
    FROM receipts
    GROUP BY CustomerId
)
SELECT customers.FirstName, customers.LastName, customer_visits.visit_count
FROM customer_visits
JOIN customers ON customers.Id = customer_visits.CustomerId
WHERE customer_visits.visit_count = (SELECT MAX(visit_count) FROM customer_visits);

SELECT c.FirstName, c.LastName, COUNT(r.ReceiptNumber) AS times_shopped
FROM customers c
JOIN receipts r ON c.Id = r.CustomerId
GROUP BY c.Id, c.FirstName, c.LastName
HAVING COUNT(r.ReceiptNumber) = (
    SELECT MAX(receipt_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(ReceiptNumber) AS receipt_count
        FROM receipts
        GROUP BY CustomerId
    )
);

SELECT DISTINCT r.CustomerId
FROM receipts r
JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
GROUP BY r.CustomerId
HAVING MIN(g.Price) > 5;

WITH receipt_good_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        r.CustomerId,
        i.Item,
        g.Price,
        COUNT(*) AS quantity
    FROM receipts r
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, r.ReceiptNumber, i.Item
),
customer_good_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerId,
        Item,
        AVG(Price * quantity) AS avg_spent_per_good
    FROM receipt_good_spending
    GROUP BY CustomerId, Item
)
SELECT CustomerId
FROM customer_good_avg
GROUP BY CustomerId
HAVING MIN(avg_spent_per_good) > 5;

SELECT DISTINCT CustomerId
FROM (
    SELECT 
        r.CustomerId,
        i.Item,
        AVG(good_receipt_total) AS avg_per_good
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            r.CustomerId,
            i.Item,
            r.ReceiptNumber,
            SUM(g.Price) AS good_receipt_total
        FROM receipts r
        JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
        JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
        GROUP BY r.CustomerId, i.Item, r.ReceiptNumber
    ) AS receipt_good_totals
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, i.Item
) AS customer_good_avg
GROUP BY CustomerId
HAVING MIN(avg_per_good) > 5;

WITH customer_good_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        r.CustomerId, 
        i.Item, 
        SUM(g.Price) AS total_spent,
        COUNT(DISTINCT r.ReceiptNumber) AS receipt_count,
        SUM(g.Price) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT r.ReceiptNumber) AS avg_spent
    FROM receipts r
    JOIN items i ON r.ReceiptNumber = i.Receipt
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, i.Item
)
SELECT CustomerId
FROM customer_good_avg
GROUP BY CustomerId
HAVING MIN(avg_spent) > 5;

WITH receipt_good_total AS (
    SELECT 
        i.Receipt,
        i.Item,
        g.Price,
        COUNT(*) AS quantity,
        g.Price * COUNT(*) AS total_spent
    FROM items i
    JOIN goods g ON i.Item = g.Id
    GROUP BY i.Receipt, i.Item
),
customer_good_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        r.CustomerId,
        rgt.Item AS good_id,
        AVG(rgt.total_spent) AS avg_spent_per_good
    FROM receipts r
    JOIN receipt_good_total rgt ON r.ReceiptNumber = rgt.Receipt
    GROUP BY r.CustomerId, rgt.Item
)
SELECT CustomerId
FROM customer_good_avg
GROUP BY CustomerId
HAVING MIN(avg_spent_per_good) > 5;

);

SELECT M.Title
FROM Movies M
JOIN (
    SELECT Movie, COUNT(*) AS theater_count
    FROM MovieTheaters
    GROUP BY Movie
) AS T ON M.Code = T.Movie
WHERE T.theater_count = (
    SELECT MAX(theater_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS theater_count
        FROM MovieTheaters
        GROUP BY Movie
    ) AS counts
);

    e.Name AS PhysicianName,
    e.Position,
    hc.Level AS ClearanceLevel,
    p.Name AS PlanetName
FROM 
    Employee e
INNER JOIN 
    Has_Clearance hc ON e.EmployeeID = hc.Employee
INNER JOIN 
    Planet p ON hc.Planet = p.PlanetID
WHERE 
    e.Position = 'physician'
ORDER BY 
    e.Name, p.Name;

    e.Position = 'Physician'

WITH JohnClients AS (
    SELECT AccountNumber
    FROM Client
    WHERE Name LIKE '%John%'
),
MaxWeightPackage AS (
    SELECT MAX(p.Weight) AS MaxWeight
    FROM Package p
    WHERE p.Sender IN (SELECT AccountNumber FROM JohnClients)
)
SELECT p.PackageNumber, p.Weight
FROM Package p
WHERE p.Sender IN (SELECT AccountNumber FROM JohnClients)
  AND p.Weight = (SELECT MaxWeight FROM MaxWeightPackage);

SELECT 
    c.Name AS ClientName, 
    COUNT(*) AS NumberOfPackagesSent
FROM Package p
JOIN Client c ON p.Sender = c.AccountNumber
GROUP BY p.Sender, c.Name
ORDER BY NumberOfPackagesSent DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.Name AS ClientName,
    COUNT(*) AS NumberOfPackagesSent
FROM 
    Package p
JOIN 
    Client c ON p.Sender = c.AccountNumber
GROUP BY 
    c.AccountNumber, c.Name
ORDER BY 
    NumberOfPackagesSent DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.Name AS ClientName,
    COUNT(*) AS NumberOfPackagesSent
FROM Package p
JOIN Client c ON p.Sender = c.AccountNumber
GROUP BY p.Sender, c.Name
ORDER BY NumberOfPackagesSent DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH PackageCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        Sender, 
        COUNT(*) AS num_packages
    FROM Package
    GROUP BY Sender
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_packages) AS max_count
    FROM PackageCounts
)
SELECT 
    c.Name AS client_name,
    pc.num_packages AS number_of_packages_sent
FROM PackageCounts pc
JOIN Client c ON pc.Sender = c.AccountNumber
JOIN MaxCount mc ON pc.num_packages = mc.max_count;

WITH SenderCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        Sender, 
        COUNT(*) AS PackageCount
    FROM Package
    GROUP BY Sender
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(PackageCount) AS MaxPackageCount
    FROM SenderCounts
)
SELECT 
    c.Name AS ClientName, 
    sc.PackageCount
FROM SenderCounts sc
JOIN Client c ON sc.Sender = c.AccountNumber
JOIN MaxCount mc ON sc.PackageCount = mc.MaxPackageCount;

1884:
WITH RecipientCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        Recipient,
        COUNT(*) AS PackageCount
    FROM Package
    GROUP BY Recipient
),
MinCount AS (
    SELECT MIN(PackageCount) AS MinPackageCount
    FROM RecipientCounts
)
SELECT 
    rc.PackageCount AS "Smallest number of packages received",
    c.Name AS "Recipient name"
FROM RecipientCounts rc
JOIN Client c ON rc.Recipient = c.AccountNumber
JOIN MinCount mc ON rc.PackageCount = mc.MinPackageCount
ORDER BY c.Name;

SELECT 
    c.Name AS ClientName,
    COUNT(p.Shipment || '-' || p.PackageNumber) AS PackageCount
FROM 
    Package p
JOIN 
    Client c ON p.Recipient = c.AccountNumber
GROUP BY 
    c.AccountNumber, c.Name
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.Shipment || '-' || p.PackageNumber) = (
        SELECT MIN(pkg_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                COUNT(Shipment || '-' || PackageNumber) AS pkg_count
            FROM 
                Package
            GROUP BY 
                Recipient
        ) AS counts
    );

WITH RecipientCounts AS (
    SELECT Recipient, COUNT(*) AS package_count
    FROM Package
    GROUP BY Recipient
)
SELECT rc.package_count AS "Smallest number of packages received", c.Name AS "Recipient name"
FROM RecipientCounts rc
JOIN Client c ON rc.Recipient = c.AccountNumber
WHERE rc.package_count = (SELECT MIN(package_count) FROM RecipientCounts)
ORDER BY c.Name;

WITH RecipientCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        c.AccountNumber,
        c.Name AS ClientName,
        COUNT(p.PackageNumber) AS PackagesReceived
    FROM Client c
    JOIN Package p ON c.AccountNumber = p.Recipient
    GROUP BY c.AccountNumber, c.Name
),
MinCount AS (
    SELECT MIN(PackagesReceived) AS MinPackages
    FROM RecipientCounts
)
SELECT 
    rc.PackagesReceived AS "Smallest number of packages received",
    rc.ClientName AS "By whom"
FROM RecipientCounts rc
JOIN MinCount mc ON rc.PackagesReceived = mc.MinPackages
ORDER BY rc.ClientName;

WITH PackageCounts AS (
    SELECT c.AccountNumber, c.Name, COUNT(p.Shipment) AS num_packages
    FROM Client c
    LEFT JOIN Package p ON c.AccountNumber = p.Recipient
    GROUP BY c.AccountNumber, c.Name
)
SELECT AccountNumber, Name, num_packages
FROM PackageCounts
WHERE num_packages = (SELECT MIN(num_packages) FROM PackageCounts);

        FROM Package

    ) AS sub
)

    JOIN Client c ON p.Recipient = c.AccountNumber

HAVING 
    COUNT(p.Shipment) = (

            FROM Package

        ) AS counts
    );

    GROUP BY

    pkg_counts.package_count = (

        FROM (

            FROM Package

        ) counts
    );

     FROM Package

    JOIN Planet pl ON s.Planet = pl.PlanetID

    WHERE c.Name = 'Zapp Brannigan'

FROM author a
JOIN (
    SELECT Author_ID, COUNT(*) AS book_count
    FROM book
    GROUP BY Author_ID
) bc ON a.Author_ID = bc.Author_ID
WHERE bc.book_count = (
    SELECT MAX(book_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS book_count
        FROM book
        GROUP BY Author_ID
    ) AS counts
);

WITH author_book_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        a.Author_ID,
        a.Name,
        a.Gender,
        COUNT(b.Book_ID) AS book_count
    FROM author a
    LEFT JOIN book b ON a.Author_ID = b.Author_ID
    GROUP BY a.Author_ID, a.Name, a.Gender
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(book_count) AS max_book_count
    FROM author_book_counts
)
SELECT 
    Name,
    Gender
FROM author_book_counts
WHERE book_count = (SELECT max_book_count FROM max_count);

GROUP BY r.staff_role_code
ORDER BY r.staff_role_code;

SELECT 
    r.staff_role_code,
    COUNT(DISTINCT sip.document_id, sip.process_id) AS num_document_processes
FROM 
    Ref_Staff_Roles r
LEFT JOIN 
    Staff_in_Processes sip ON r.staff_role_code = sip.staff_role_code
GROUP BY 
    r.staff_role_code
ORDER BY 
    r.staff_role_code;

SELECT 
    r.staff_role_code,
    COUNT(sip.document_id) AS num_document_processes
FROM 
    Ref_Staff_Roles r
LEFT JOIN 
    Staff_in_Processes sip ON r.staff_role_code = sip.staff_role_code
GROUP BY 
    r.staff_role_code
ORDER BY 
    r.staff_role_code;

SELECT 
    r.staff_role_code, 
    COUNT(sip.staff_role_code) AS number_of_document_processes
FROM 
    Ref_Staff_Roles r
LEFT JOIN 
    Staff_in_Processes sip ON r.staff_role_code = sip.staff_role_code
GROUP BY 
    r.staff_role_code
ORDER BY 
    r.staff_role_code;

SELECT 
    r.staff_role_code,
    COALESCE(d.num_document_processes, 0) AS num_document_processes
FROM Ref_Staff_Roles r
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        staff_role_code,
        COUNT(*) AS num_document_processes
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT staff_role_code, document_id, process_id
        FROM Staff_in_Processes
    ) AS distinct_combos
    GROUP BY staff_role_code
) d ON r.staff_role_code = d.staff_role_code
ORDER BY r.staff_role_code;

    SELECT 
        client_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS invoice_count
    FROM Invoices
    GROUP BY client_id
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(invoice_count) AS max_invoice_count
    FROM InvoiceCounts
)
SELECT 
    c.client_id, 
    c.client_details
FROM Clients c
JOIN InvoiceCounts ic ON c.client_id = ic.client_id
JOIN MaxCount mc ON ic.invoice_count = mc.max_invoice_count;

    a.agency_details
FROM Agencies a
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        agency_id,
        COUNT(staff_id) AS staff_count
    FROM Staff
    GROUP BY agency_id
) sc ON a.agency_id = sc.agency_id
WHERE sc.staff_count = (
    SELECT MAX(staff_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(staff_id) AS staff_count
        FROM Staff
        GROUP BY agency_id
    ) max_count
);

WITH StaffCount AS (
    SELECT 
        agency_id,
        COUNT(staff_id) AS num_staff
    FROM Staff
    GROUP BY agency_id
),
MaxStaff AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_staff) AS max_staff
    FROM StaffCount
)
SELECT 
    a.agency_id,
    a.agency_details
FROM Agencies a
JOIN StaffCount sc ON a.agency_id = sc.agency_id
JOIN MaxStaff ms ON sc.num_staff = ms.max_staff;

        FROM Staff

    ) t
);

SELECT 
    i.invoice_id,
    i.invoice_status,
    i.invoice_details
FROM Invoices i
JOIN Payments p ON i.invoice_id = p.invoice_id
GROUP BY i.invoice_id, i.invoice_status, i.invoice_details
ORDER BY COUNT(p.payment_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH PaymentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        invoice_id,
        COUNT(*) AS num_payments
    FROM Payments
    GROUP BY invoice_id
),
RankedInvoices AS (
    SELECT 
        invoice_id,
        num_payments,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY num_payments DESC) AS payment_rank
    FROM PaymentCounts
)
SELECT 
    i.invoice_id,
    i.invoice_status,
    i.invoice_details
FROM Invoices i
JOIN RankedInvoices r ON i.invoice_id = r.invoice_id
WHERE r.payment_rank = 1;

WITH PaymentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        invoice_id,
        COUNT(*) AS num_payments
    FROM Payments
    GROUP BY invoice_id
),
MaxPaymentCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_payments) AS max_count
    FROM PaymentCounts
)
SELECT 
    i.invoice_id,
    i.invoice_status,
    i.invoice_details
FROM Invoices i
JOIN PaymentCounts pc ON i.invoice_id = pc.invoice_id
JOIN MaxPaymentCount m ON pc.num_payments = m.max_count;

SELECT 
    i.invoice_id,
    i.invoice_status,
    i.invoice_details
FROM Invoices i
JOIN Payments p ON i.invoice_id = p.invoice_id
GROUP BY i.invoice_id, i.invoice_status, i.invoice_details
ORDER BY COUNT(p.payment_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH PaymentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        i.invoice_id,
        i.invoice_status,
        i.invoice_details,
        COUNT(p.payment_id) AS num_payments
    FROM Invoices i
    LEFT JOIN Payments p ON i.invoice_id = p.invoice_id
    GROUP BY i.invoice_id, i.invoice_status, i.invoice_details
)
SELECT invoice_id, invoice_status, invoice_details
FROM PaymentCounts
WHERE num_payments = (SELECT MAX(num_payments) FROM PaymentCounts);

    C.client_details,
    S.staff_details
FROM Meetings M

JOIN Staff_in_Meetings SIM ON M.meeting_id = SIM.meeting_id
JOIN Staff S ON SIM.staff_id = S.staff_id
ORDER BY M.start_date_time, S.staff_details;
